    The fields listed below are available in the CDE One and CDE Triage reports for custom reporting. Please note that this list does not include the fields available in the near-real time CDS General/ CDS Productivity report.

    • Analytics Glossary

      The fields listed below are available in the CDE One and CDE Triage reports for custom reporting. Please note that this list does not include the fields available in the near-real time CDS General/ CDS Productivity report.

Analytics Glossary

The fields listed below are available in the CDE One and CDE Triage reports for custom reporting. Please note that this list does not include the fields available in the near-real time CDS General/ CDS Productivity report.

Category Field Name Definition
Accepted Codes #Diagnoses Accepted_Suggested (Including Quality) Out of the total CLU suggested codes, this column displays the count of Diagnosis codes accepted by the CDS from the CDS Assistant.
Note:

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes .

Quality codes are included in this count.
Accepted Codes #Diagnoses Total Accepted_Suggested (including Quality), Other Out of the total suggested codes, This column displays the count of the diagnosis codes that were accepted, i.e. added to the Working Review or the Possible Reviews section on the Reviews screen.
Note:
This column displays the count will include diagnosis codes from Suggested category (including Quality codes) and Other category.
Accepted Codes Accepted Codes List

Displays the list of diagnoses codes accepted by the CDS from CDS Assistant.

Note:
If CDS accepts multiple codes they are displayed comma separated.
Accepted Codes Diagnoses Accepted_Suggested (Including Quality) Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes accepted by the CDS from the CDS Assistant.
Note:

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes .

Quality codes are included in this field.

Multiple values are comma separated.
Accepted Codes Diagnoses Total Accepted_Suggested (including Quality) Other Out of the total suggested codes, This column displays the count of the diagnosis codes that were accepted, i.e. added to the Working Review or the Possible Reviews section on the Reviews screen.
Note:
This column displays the count will include diagnosis codes from Suggested category (including Quality codes) and Other category
Activity Type Activity Type

Displays the list of Activity types that is performed on the encounter.

Example: Clarification creation, Post-Discharge Review etc.
ActivityDate Activity Date

Displays the list of Activity Dates when an activity was performed.

Example: 2/8/2020
ActivityDate Day_of_Month

Displays the numeric day of the month of the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
ActivityDate Month

Displays the month value of the Activity Date.

Example: Feb, Jul etc.
ActivityDate Month_Name

Displays the month and year value of the Activity Date.

Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc.
ActivityDate Month_Of_Year

Displays the numeric value of the month of the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity date is 3/21/2020, Month_of_Year is 3
ActivityDate Week

Displays the week range of the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
ActivityDate Week_Name Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
ActivityDate Week_Of_Year

Displays the week number for the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity Date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
ActivityDate WeekEND

Displays the last date of the week for the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
ActivityDate Weekstart

Displays the first date of the week for the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
ActivityDate Year

Displays the year value for the Activity Date.

Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021
AdmissionDate Admit Date

Displays the date when the patient was admitted.

Example: 9/19/2020
AdmissionDate Day_of_Month

Displays the numeric day of the month of the Admit Date.

Example: If Admit date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
AdmissionDate Month

Displays the month value of the Admit Date.

Example: Feb, Jul etc.
AdmissionDate Month Name

Displays the month and year value of the Admit Date.

Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc.
AdmissionDate Month of Year

Displays the numeric value of the month of the Admit Date.

Example: If Activity date is 8/12/2020, Month_of_Year is 8
AdmissionDate Month Sort Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
AdmissionDate Week

Displays the week range of the Admit Date.

Example: If Admit Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
AdmissionDate Week_Name Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
AdmissionDate Week_Of_Year

Displays the week number for the Admit Date.

Example: If Admit Date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
AdmissionDate WeekEND

Displays the last date of the week for the Admit Date.

Example: If Admit Date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
AdmissionDate WeekStart

Displays the first date of the week for the Admit Date.

Example: If Admit Date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
AdmissionDate Year

Displays the year value for the Admit Date.

Example: If Activity Date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021
Assistant Details Suggestion Displays the AI suggestion that was presented in CDS Assistant.
CDS CDS

Displays the name of the CDS along with the ID.

Example: Last Name, First Name MI (CDS ID)
CDS CDS ID Displays the CDS ID of the CDS.
CDS CDS Name

Displays the name of the CDS.

Example: Last Name, First Name MI
CDS First Name Displays the First Name of the CDS.
CDS Last Name Displays the Last Name of the CDS.
CDS Middle Name Displays the Middle Initial of the CDS.
CDS Status

Displays the current status of the CDS user.

Example: Active, Inactive etc.
Clarification Details % Both Impact Clarifications

Displays out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration.

% Both Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration./ Total Clarifications Sent) x 100

Example: 40%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details % Financial Impact Clarification

Displays of total clarifications sent, the % count of Financial Impact Clarifications sent.

% Financial Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Financial Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100

Example: 45%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details % IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_AGREED

Do not use.

Use Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate
Clarification Details % IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_RESPONDED

Do not use.

Use Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate
Clarification Details % No. of times Sent Clari Agreed

Displays out of total overall instances sent, the percentage of overall instances agreed.

Example: 81%
Clarification Details % Quality Impact Clarifications

Displays out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of Quality Impact Clarifications sent.

% Quality Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Quality Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100

Example: 19%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality' in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details % Sent Clarifications Agreed

Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications with Response as Agreed.

% Sent Clarifications Agreed = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 78%

Overall Clarifications Agreed:

For Final Clarification: The count of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

For Not Final Clarifications: The count of sent clarifications with at least one ‘agreed’ instance.

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details % Sent Clarifications Not Final

Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications Not Final.

% Sent Clarifications Not Final = ((Count of clarifications which do not have a Final Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 15%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details % Sent Clarifications Not Responded

Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications not responded

% Sent Clarifications Not Responded = ((Count of clarifications which are not responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 28%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details % SEV Impact Clarification

Displays out of total clarifications sent, the % of SEV Impact Clarifications sent.

% SEV Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with primary type at Reconciliation as SEV / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100

Example: 67%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarification Details Alert Category

Displays the list of Quality Alert categories available.

Example: PSI, PDI, NQI

Clarification Details Avg. Response TAT (Days)

Displays the Average Response Turn Around Time (TAT) in days.

Avg. Response TAT (Days) = Sum of Response TAT (Days) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in days.

Example: 8

Note:

Clarification Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Removed and Retracted status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Avg. Response TAT (Hours)

Displays the Average Response Turn Around Time (TAT) in hours.

Avg. Response TAT (Hours) = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) of all the instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response/ Total count of instances Responded (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in hours.

Example: 258

Note:

Clarification Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Removed and Retracted status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Both Impact Clarification Agreed Rate

Displays out of total clarifications with BOTH (financial and quality) Impact Agreed, the percentage of clarifications with BOTH (financial and quality) Impact Responded.

BOTH Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((BOTH Impact Clarification Agreed/BOTH Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89% or 100%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation
Clarification Details Both Impact Clarification Response Rate

Displays out of total Clarifications Sent, the percentage of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration responded.

Both Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration responded./ Both Impact Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 89% or 100%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Both Impact Clarifications Agreed

Displays the count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration agreed.

This field displays the count of sent BOTH Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Both Impact Clarifications Responded

Displays the count of sent clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration, for which has FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Both Impact Clarifications Sent

Displays the count of clarifications with Primary Type at Reconciliation configured as BOTH (financial and quality) in the Admin configuration.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Cal Response TAT

This displays the Clarification Response Turn Around Time (Hours) for all the clarifications in the encounter.

Example : 547
Clarification Details Clar Response Count

Displays the count of clarifications which have at least one instance response.

Example: 45
Clarification Details Clar with Final Indicator

Displays the count of clarifications with a Final Response.

Example: 75
Clarification Details CLAR_AGREED

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Agreed.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Agreed
Clarification Details CLAR_ALTERNATIVE_DIAGNOSIS

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Alternative Diagnosis

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Alternative Diagnosis
Clarification Details CLAR_CREATED_DATE

This is a flag to identify the Clarification Created Date.

When used in reports, displays the date the clarification is created.
Clarification Details CLAR_DISCUSS

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Discuss.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Discuss.
Clarification Details CLAR_NORESPONSE

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as No Response.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as No Response.
Clarification Details CLAR_NOTAGREED

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Not Agreed.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Not Agreed.
Clarification Details CLAR_OTHER_EXPLANATION

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Other Explanation.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Other Explanation.
Clarification Details CLAR_RESPONDED

This is a flag to identify clarifications reponded.

Note:
When used in report, displays the total count of clarifications responded.
Clarification Details CLAR_SENT_TO_ANOTHER_PROVIDER

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Sent to Another Provider.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Sent to Another Provider.
Clarification Details CLAR_UNABLE_TO_DETERMINE

This is a flag to identify clarifications with Response as Unable to Determine.

When used in reports, displays the total count of clarifications with Final response as Unable to Determine.
Clarification Details Clari Provider

Displays the name of the provider with Final response to the resolved clarification.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Clarification Details Clarification CDS Name

Displays the name of the CDS who initiated the clarification.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Clarification Details Clarification Closed Date

Displays the date when clarification was closed.

Example: 5/25/2020
Clarification Details Clarification Closed Date and Time

Displays the date when clarification was closed.

Example: 1/25/2021
Clarification Details Clarification Closed Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when clarification was closed.

Example: 1/25/2020

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Clarification Details Clarification Created Date

Displays the date when clarification was created.

Example: 5/25/2020
Clarification Details Clarification Created Date and Time

Displays the date when clarification was created.

Example: 1/25/2021
Clarification Details Clarification Follow-up Date

Displays the Follow-up date as entered by the CDS when they review and save the encounter.

Example: 1/13/1990
Clarification Details Clarification Impact Type

Displays the Impact for the Clarification type (Both standard and custom) when CDS raises the clarification.

Example: Financial Impact, Quality Impact, Both Impact

Note:
Impact is configured in Clarifications ---> Type Setup for both standard and custom clarification types.
Clarification Details Clarification Primary Rec. Type

Displays the list of Primary Type at Reconciliation clarification types.

Example: CC, MCC, MST, Custom1, Custom2

Note:
Both standard and custom clarification types is considered.
Clarification Details Clarification Provider

Displays the name of the provider to whom the clarification was sent.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Clarification Details Clarification Rate

Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of sent clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.

Clarification Rate = (Count of clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters/Count of Initial Reviews performed)*100

Example: 67%

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Clarification Details Clarification Response TAT (Days)

Displays the Clarification Response turn around time in Days.

Response TAT (Days) for a clarification = Sum of Response TAT (Days) for all the instances (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in the clarification.

Example: 400

Note:

Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.

Clarifications Response TAT is not calculation for clarifications with Removed and Retracted status.

Note:
If less than 24 hours, count as (0) days.
Clarification Details Clarification Response TAT (Hours)

Displays the Clarification Response turn around time in Hours.

Response TAT (Hours) for a clarification = Sum of Response TAT (Hours) for all the instances (with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) in the clarification.

Note:

Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response are not considered in this metric calculation.

Clarifications Response TAT is not calculation for clarifications with Removed and Retracted status.
Clarification Details Clarification Source Displays the clarification source associated to the encounter.
Clarification Details Clarification Status

Displays the different statuses for a clarification.

Example: Closed, Deleted, Retracted, Sent etc
Clarification Details Clarification Type

Displays the list of available 'Type at Reconciliation' clarification types.

Example: CC, MCC, CLIN VAL, Custom1, Custom2 etc

Note:
Both standard and custom clarification type is considered.
Clarification Details CLARIFICATION_TIMING

Displays the review timing of the clarification based on the final instance.

Example: Concurrent , Retrospective.

Note:

Concurrent Clarification if instance is marked final before patient's discharge.

Retrospective Clarification if instance is marked final after patient's discharge.

Blank if clarification does not have a final instance.
Clarification Details Clarifications No Impact Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details CLOSED_DATE

Displays the date when clarification was closed.

Example: 9/18/2020
Clarification Details Code

Displays the CM/PCS for which the clarification is raised by the CDS.

Example: R52, A208, 02HA4RS etc.
Clarification Details Code Description

Displays the CM/PCS code description for which the clarification is raised by the CDS.

Example: R52, A208, 02HA4RS etc.
Clarification Details CONCATE_IMPACT_CLAR_AGREED_

RESPONDED_KPI

 Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details CONCATE_IMPACT_CLAR_RESPONDED_KPI Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details Enc with No Response Impact Clarifications

Count of encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with Final Response as No Response.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Clarification Details DELETE_IND

Displays the flag to indicate if the clarification is deleted.

Example: True, False

Note:
True is displayed for deleted clarifications.
Clarification Details Encounter Clarification Rate

Displays the percentage of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.

Encounter Clarification Rate= (The count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED./ Count of Initial Reviews performed) *100

Example: 44%

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Clarification Details ENCOUNTER_HAS_INITIAL_REVIEW

Displays the total count of clarifications sent for encounters with Initial Review.

Example: 56
Clarification Details Encounters with Clarifications

Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.

Example: 69

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Clarification Details Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications

Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.

Example: 45

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Clarification Details Encounters with Quality Impact Clarifications

Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one Quality Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.

Example: 34

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Clarification Details ESCALATED Displays whether the overdue clarification instance is escalated.

Format: Y/N.
Clarification Details Escalated Clarifications The count of overdue clarification instances with at least one clarification escalation checkbox selected.
Clarification Details ESCALATION_TYPE_DESCRIPTION Displays the name of the selected escalation checkbox.
Examples: 1st Escalation, 2nd Escalation, Liaison Escalation, CDI Manager Escalation.
Note:
When multiple escalation checkboxes are selected, the values are displayed as comma-separated entries.
Clarification Details FINAL_IND

Displays the flag to indicate if the clarification has a Final response

Example: True, False

Note:
True is displayed for clarifications with Final Response.
Clarification Details FINAL_IND_DISPLAY

Displays the flag for clarifications with Final Response.

Example: Y

Note:
Y is displayed for clarifications with Final Response, Blank is displayed for clarifications without Final Response.
Clarification Details FINAL_IND_SLICER Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarification

Displays the count of Financial Impact Clarifications.

Example: 2

Note:
Clarification with 'Primary Type' as CC, PDX, MCC, PROC, MST, HIV, POA are termed as Financial Impact Clarifications.
Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate

Displays out of total Financial Impact Clarifications Responded, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed.

Financial Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((Financial Impact Clarification Agreed/ Financial Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. 89% or 100%

Example: 89%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarification Rate

Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications.

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Encounters with Financial Impact Clarifications /Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) )* 100)

Example: 67%

Note:

Financial Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one Financial Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations
Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate

Displays out of total Financial Impact Clarifications Sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications Responded.

Financial Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((Financial Impact Clarification Responded/ Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 75%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed

Displays the count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

Example : 47

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarifications Responded

Displays the count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

Example: 66

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Financial Impact Clarifications Sent

Displays the count of Financial Impact clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.

Example: 39

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarification Details Followup Date and Time

Displays the Follow-up date as entered by the CDS when they review and save the encounter.

Example: 1/13/1990
Clarification Details FOLLOWUP_DATE Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details Impact Clarification Sent Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details IMPACT_CLAR_RECONCILIATION_TYPE

Displays the list of available Financial Impact Clarification types.

Example: CC, PDX etc.

Note:
Clarification with 'Type at Reconciliation' as CC, PDX, MCC, PROC, MST, HIV, POA are termed as Financial Impact Clarifications.

Both standard and custom 'Type at Reconciliation' clarification types is considered.
Clarification Details IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_AGREED_

RESPONSE_REIMB

Displays the total count of Agreed responses for Financial Impact Clarifications sent.

Example: 15
Clarification Details IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_REIMB Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_RESPONDED

_REIMB

 Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_SENT Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details IMPACT_CLARIFICATIONS_SENT_REIMB Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details Instance Response Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when the instance is responded.

Example: 01/05/2021 08:38:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Clarification Details Instance Response TAT (Days)

Displays the Instance Response turn around time in Days.

Instance Response TAT (Days) = (Instance Response Date – Instance Sent Date) in days.

Note:

Instance Response TAT is not calculated for Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response.

If less than 24 hours, count as (0) days.
Clarification Details Instance Response TAT (Hours)

Displays the Instance Response turn around time in Hours.

Instance Response TAT (Hours) = (Instance Response Date/Time – Instance Sent Date/Time) in hours.

Note:
Instance Response TAT is not calculated for Instance with Response as Pending, Retracted or No response.
Clarification Details

Instance Sent After DC

Identifies and exports list of clarification with Instance Sent Date/time > Discharge Date/time.
  • Format : Y/N
Clarification Details Instance Sent Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when the instance is sent

Example: 01/05/2021 08:38:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_AGREED_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as agreed.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_ALTERNATIVE_DIAGNOSIS_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Alternative Diagnosis.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_CDS_ID

Displays the User ID of the CDS who has sent the instance.

Example: marshad
Clarification Details INSTANCE_CDS_NAME

Displays the Name of the CDS who has sent the instance.

Example: Last Name, First Name (User ID)
Clarification Details INSTANCE_CLAR_RESPONSE This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances responded.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_CLAR_SENT This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances sent.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_DISCUSS_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Discuss.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_FINAL_IND This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response marked as Final
Clarification Details INSTANCE_FINAL_IND_NOT_AGREED This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with Final response as Not Agreed.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_FOLLOWUP_CDS_ID Displays the User ID (CDS ID) of the Follow up CDS for the clarification instance.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_FOLLOWUP_CDS_NAME

Displays the name and CDS ID of the Follow up CDS for the clarification instance.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Clarification Details INSTANCE_MESSAGE_TEXT

Displays the message of the instance when provider responds to the clarification instance.

Note:
This is the text from the message field displayed in Response tab in Clarifications Screen.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_NO_RESPONSE_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as No Response.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_NOT_AGREED_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Not Agreed.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_OTHER_EXPLANATION_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Other Explanation.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_PENDING_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances with response as Pending.
Clarification Details INSTANCE_PROVIDER_RESPONSE This is a flag to identify rge provider response of the clarification instance.
Clarification Details IS_ELECTRONIC_CLAR This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of clarification instances sent electronically.
Clarification Details IS_RETRACTED This is a binary flag that is used in calculating the total count of instances with Instance Response as Retracted.
Clarification Details MAX FINAL IND NOT AGREED Do not use.
Clarification Details No Impact Clarifications Do not use.
Clarification Details No Response Impact Clarifications

Count of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Clarification Details No Response Impact Clarification Rate

Out of total financial impact clarifications sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as “No Response” .

No Response Impact Clarification Rate = (Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response / Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) *100. Format: 1.67%.

Note:

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Clarification Details

Non Responding Providers

Displays the count of (Sent To) providers with at least one financial impact clarification instance responded as No Responses, i.e. Provider Response Field = No Response.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Clarification Details

Not Responded Impact Clarifications

Displays the count and percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications that were not responded by the providers and with Final Response as No Response for the selected time period.

Format: Not Responded Impact Clarifications (No Response Rate). E.g. 12 (56%).

Note:

Not Responded Impact Clarifications = Count of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as “No Response” for the selected time period.

No Response Rate = Out of total Financial Impact clarifications sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as “No Response” .

No Response Rate = (Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response / Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Sent) *100.
Clarification Details NPI_Sent To Provider National Provider Identifier of the provider to whom the clarification was sent.
Clarification Details NPI_Responded By Provider National Provider Identifier of the provider who responded to the clarification.
Clarification Details Other Impact Clarifications Do not use.
Clarification Details Other Reconciliation Type

Displays the list of available 'Other Reconciliation Types' assigned to the clarification.

Example: Generic, HCC, Customclar1

Note:
Both standard and custom clarification types is considered.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Clarification Details Other Type

Displays the list of available 'Other Type' assigned to the clarification.

Example: Generic, HCC, Customclar1

Note:
Both standard and custom clarification types is considered.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Clarification Details Overall Agreed Rate

Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarifications agreed.

Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 45%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis) = ( count of clarifications with Final response as Agreed or Alternative Diagnosis/ Overall Clarifications Responded with a Final response) x 100).
Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation. Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count. Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Agreed Rate (Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses Responses)

Out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarifications agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses.

Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed, Other Explanation, Alternative Diagnoses/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Note:
  • Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
  • "Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Deleted Rate

Displays out of total clarifications, the percentage of clarification with status as Deleted.

Overall Clarifications Deleted Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with status as Deleted / Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 7%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Discuss Rate

Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Discuss".

Overall Clarifications Discuss Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Discuss/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 56%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Agreed (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis)
Overall Clarifications Agreed (Agreed and Alternative Diagnosis) = The count of clarifications with Final response as Agreed or Alternative Diagnosis. E.g. 24.
Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status is not considered for this metric calculation. Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification No Response Rate

Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "No Response".

Overall Clarifications No Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with No Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 10%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Not Agreed Rate

Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Not Agreed".

Overall Clarifications Not Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Not Agreed / Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 12%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Other Explanation Rate

Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Other Explanation".

Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Other Explanation/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 45%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Retracted Rate

Displays out of total clarifications, the percentage of clarification with status as Retracted.

Overall Clarifications Retracted Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with status as Retracted / Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 1%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Sent to another Provider Rate

Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Sent to another Provider".

Overall Clarifications Sent to another Provider Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Sent to another Provider/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 88%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarification Unable to Determine Rate

Displays out of total responded clarifications, the percentage of clarification with Final response as "Unable to Determine".

Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 23%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Agreed

Displays the count of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

Example: 20

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as Alternative Diagnosis.

Example: 5

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Deleted

Displays the count of clarifications with Status as Deleted.

Example: 17

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Discuss

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as Discuss.

Example: 19

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications No Response

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as No Response.

Example: 8

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Not Agreed

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as Not Agreed.

Example: 7

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Not Final

Displays the count of sent clarifications that do not have a "Final" Response.

Example: 15

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Other Explanation

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as Other Explanation.

Example: 14

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Responded

Displays the count of sent clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

Example: 67

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Retracted

Displays the count of clarifications with Status as Retracted.

Example: 2

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Sent

Displays the count of sent clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED for the reviewed encounters.

Example: 78

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications may or may not have a FINAL response.

Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Sent to another Provider

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as Sent to another Provider.

Example: 9

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine

Displays the count of clarifications with Final response as Unable to Determine.

Example: 21

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Agreed Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the percentage of Clarification Instances with Response as Agreed.

Overall Instance Agreed Rate = Instances with response as Agreed / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 20%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Alternative Diagnosis Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Alternative Diagnosis.

Overall Instance Alternative Diagnosis Rate = Instances with Response as "Alternative Diagnosis" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 44%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Discuss Rate

Out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the percentage of Clarification Instances with Response as Discuss.

Overall Instance Discuss Rate = Instances with Response as "Discuss" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 89%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance No Response Rate

Displays out of total Clarifications Instances sent with Response other than Retracted , the % of Clarification Instances with Response as No Response.

Overall Instance No Response Rate = Instances with Response as "No Response" / The count of clarification instances sent with Response other than Retracted ) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 15%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Not Agreed Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response , the percentage of Clarification Instances with response as Not Agreed.

Overall Instance Not Agreed Rate = Instances with Response as "Not Agreed" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 23%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Other Explanation Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Other Explanation.

Overall Instances Other Explanation Rate = Instances with Response as "Other Explanation" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 41%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Pending Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances sent with response other than Retracted, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Pending

Overall Instance Pending Rate = Instances with Response as "Pending" / The count of total clarification instances sent with response other than Retracted) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 5%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Response Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances sent with response other than Retracted, the % of clarification Instances with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response.

Overall Instance Response Rate = (The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response /The count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 100%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Retracted Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances sent including Retracted , the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Retracted

Overall Instance Retracted Rate = Instances with Response as "Retracted" / The count of total clarification instances sent including Retracted ) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 11%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Sent to another Provider Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Sent to another Provider.

Overall Instance Sent to another Provider Rate = Instances with Response as "Sent to another Provider" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 71%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instance Unable to Determine Rate

Displays out of total Clarification Instances responded with Response other than Pending, Retracted or No Response, the % of Clarification Instances with Response as Unable to Determine.

Overall Instance Unable to Determine Rate = Instances with Response as "Unable to Determine" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 69%

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Agreed

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is Agreed.

Example: 11

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Alternative Diagnosis

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Alternative Diagnosis".

Example: 15

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Discuss

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Discuss".

Example: 9

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances No Response

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "No Response".

Example: 7

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Not Agreed

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Not Agreed".

Example: 5

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Other Explanation

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Other Explanation".

Example: 8

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Pending

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Pending".

Example: 2

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Responded

Displays count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response.

Example: 55

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Responded including Pending and No Response

Displays the count of clarification instances with response other than Retracted.

Example: 39

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Retracted

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Retracted".

Example: 8

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Sent

Displays the count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.

Example: 55

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.

Retracted Instances are not considered for this calculation. (Instance Response= Retracted)
Clarification Details Overall Instances Sent Including Retracted

Displays the count of sent clarification instances with all Responses.

Example: 51

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

All instance responses are considered for this calculation

Clarification Details Overall Instances Sent to another Provider

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Sent to another Provider".

Example: 17

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Instances Unable to Determine

Displays the count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Unable to Determine".

Example: 13

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overall Response Rate

Displays out of total sent clarifications, the percentage of clarifications responded.

Overall Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 78%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overdue Clarification Instances

Displays the count of clarifications with the status as Overdue.

Example: 21

Note:
An encounter can have more than one overdue clarification.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Overdue Clarifications

Displays the count of ‘Pending’ instances of the Clarifications with the status as Overdue.

Note:
The count of Clarification Instances with response = Pending.

Example: 15

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Quality Impact Clarifications Agreed Rate

Displays out of total Quality Impact Clarifications Responded, the percentage of Quality Impact Clarifications Agreed.

Quality Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((Quality Impact Clarification Agreed/ Quality Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 50%

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Quality Impact Clarification Response Rate

Displays out of total Quality Impact Clarifications Sent, the % of Quality Impact Clarifications Responded.

Quality Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((Quality Impact Clarification Responded/ Quality Impact Clarification Sent) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 100%

Note:
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details Quality Impact Clarifications Agreed

Displays the count of sent Quality Impact clarifications with FINAL response as Agreed.

Example: 9

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Quality Impact Clarifications Responded

Displays the count of sent Quality Impact clarifications with FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

Example: 18

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details Quality Impact Clarifications Sent

Displays the count of Quality Impact clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.

Example: 18

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Quality Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarification Details RECONCILIATION_IMPACT_TYPE

Displays the Impact for the Type at Reconciliation (Both standard and custom) when CDS raises the clarification.

Example: Financial Impact, Quality Impact, Both Impact

Note:
Impact is configured in Clarifications ---> Type Setup for both standard and custom clarification types.
Clarification Details Responded by

Displays the Responded By provider for the clarification instance sent by the CDS.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Clarification Details Response Code

Displays the Response Code added in the Clarification screen.

Example: A20.8

Note:
Provider can add a Response code only for Instance Response 'Alternate Specificity Diagnosis'.
Clarification Details Response Code Description

Displays the description of Response Code added in the Clarification screen.

Example: Other forms of plague

Note:
Provider can add a Response code only for Instance Response 'Alternate Specificity Diagnosis'.
Clarification Details Response Date

Displays the date when provider responded to the Instance.

Example: 7/17/2020
Clarification Details Response Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when provider responded to the Instance.

Example: 07/17/2020 05:51:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Clarification Details Response Date/Time >24hrs after DC Identifies and exports list of clarification instances with Response Date/Time > Discharge Date/Time + 24hours (Response Date/Time – Discharge Date/Time > 24hours).
  • Format : Y/N
Clarification Details RESPONSE_CODE_AND_DESCRIPTION

Displays the code and description of Response Code added in the Clarification screen.

Example: A20.8 Other forms of plague

Note:
Provider can add a Response code only for Instance Response 'Alternate Specificity Diagnosis'.
Clarification Details Response By Discharge Displays if the clarification instance was responded at the time of discharge or no.
Clarification Details Review

Displays the review panel from where the clarification is raised.

Example: WORKING, POSSIBLE
Clarification Details Sent Date

Displays the clarification sent date.

Example: 3/7/2020
Clarification Details Sent Date and Time Display

Displays the clarification sent date and time.

Example: 03/05/2021 05:33:54 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Clarification Details SEV Impact Clarifications Agreed Rate

Displays out of total SEV Impact Clarifications Responded, the percentage of SEV Impact Clarifications Agreed.

SEV Impact Clarification Agreed Rate = ((SEV Impact Clarification Agreed/ SEV Impact Clarification Responded) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 67%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details SEV Impact Clarification Response Rate

Displays out of total SEV Impact Clarifications Sent, the percentage of SEV Impact Clarifications Responded.

SEV Impact Clarification Response Rate = ((SEV Impact Clarification Responded/ SEV Impact Clarification Sent) x 100)

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 75%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Clarification Details SEV Impact Clarifications Agreed

Displays the count of sent SEV Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

Example: 2

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details SEV Impact Clarifications Responded

Displays the count of sent SEV Impact clarifications with FINAL response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

Example: 3

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Clarification Details SEV Impact Clarifications Sent

Displays the count of SEV Impact clarifications with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent for the reviewed encounters.

Example: 5

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarification Details SEV_CLAR

Displays the total count of SEV clarifications sent where Type at Reconciliation is SEV

Example: 16
Clarification Details SUFFIX

Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.

Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.
Clarification Details TOPIC_ID

Displays the list of Topic ID's for which quality alert is triggered.

Example: 3, 10, 6, 11 etc.
Clarification Details Total Clarification Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Clarification Details Total Clarifications

Displays the total count of clarifications including all statuses.

Example: 10
Clarification Details Primary Reconciliation Type

Displays description of the 'Type at Reconciliation' clarification type.

Example: Clinical Validation, Hierarchical condition category diagnosis, Custom1 , Custom2

Note:
Both standard and custom clarification type is considered.
Clarification Details Working_Financial Impact Clarifications Sent

Displays the count of Financial Impact Clarifications sent for codes from Working Review panel.

Example: 5

Note:
Only clarifications raised for codes from working review panel is considered.
Clarification Impact Type Clarification Impact Type

Displays the Clarification Impact Types as configured in the Clarifications configuration screen.

Example: Financial Impact, Quality Impact, Both etc.

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Quality’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial and Quality’ in the admin configuration is considered as BOTH.
Clarification Impact Type FINANCIAL_IMPACT_CLARIFICATION

This is a column at clarification level to indicate if the clarification is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Example: Displays 1 for Financial Impact Clarifications
ClarifcationSentDate Clarification Sent Date

Displays the list of clarification sent dates for the clarifications created by CDS that are sent to physician/provider.

Example: 10/14/2020, 4/22/2020 etc.
ClarifcationSentDate Day_Of_Month

Displays the numeric day of the month of the Clarification Sent Date

Example: If Clarification Sent Date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
ClarifcationSentDate Month

Displays the month value of the Clarification Sent Date.

Example: Feb, Jul etc.
ClarifcationSentDate Month_Name

Displays the month and year value of the Clarification Sent Date.

Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc.
ClarifcationSentDate Month_Of_Year

Displays the numeric value of the month of the Clarification Sent Date.

Example: If clarification sent date is 8/12/2020, Month_of_Year is 8
ClarifcationSentDate Week

Displays the week range of the clarification sent date.

Example: If Clarification Sent Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
ClarifcationSentDate Week_Name Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
ClarifcationSentDate Week_Of_Year

Displays the week number for the clarification sent date.

Example: If clarification sent date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
ClarifcationSentDate WeekEND

Displays the last date of the week for the clarification sent date.

Example: If clarification sent date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
ClarifcationSentDate WeekStart

Displays the first date of the week for the clarification sent date.

Example: If clarification sent date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
ClarifcationSentDate Year

Displays the year value for the clarification sent date.

Example: If clarification sent date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021
Clinical Evidence #CDS Attributed Clinical Evidence Displays the count of clinical evidences that are attributed to a suggested/working diagnosis by a CDS.
Clinical Evidence #Removed Clinical Evidence Displays the count of clinical evidences that are removed manually.
Clinical Evidence #Suggested Clinical Evidence Displays the count of clinical evidences that has no suggested diagnosis code associated with it.
Clinical Evidence #System Attributed Clinical Evidence Displays the count of clinical evidences that has suggested diagnosis code associated with it.
Note:
There can be multiple diagnosis codes associated with a clinical evidence.
Clinical Evidence CDS Attributed Clinical Evidence The clinical evidences that are attributed to a suggested/working diagnosis by a CDS.
Note:
Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Clinical Evidence CDS Attributed Linked Diagonisis Displays the working diagnosis code linked with the clinical evidence.
Note:
The CLU suggested diagnosis codes, the quality diagnosis codes, and the diagnosis codes added in the Working Review section are displayed in the Select Diagnosis drop-down list. The removed and the other category codes are excluded from the list.
