Clinical Evidence Removed Clinical Evidence Displays the clinical evidences that are removed manually for the encounter.
Note:
Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Clinical Evidence Suggested Clinical Evidence Displays the clinical evidences that has no suggested diagnosis code associated with it for the encounter.
Note:
Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Clinical Evidence System Attributed Linked Evidence Displays the clinical evidences that has suggested diagnosis code associated with it.
Note:
There can be multiple diagnosis codes associated with a clinical evidence and should be displayed comma separated.
Clinical Evidence System Attributed Linked Diagnosis Displays the clinical diagnoses that has suggested diagnosis code associated with it.
DimClarificationResponse Clarification Response

Displays the response by the physician/provider for the clarification sent.

Example: Agreed, Retracted, Not Final.
DimClarificationStatus ACTIVE_IND

Displays the ACTIVE ind from the actives raised by the CDS

Displays the ACTIVE for the ACTIVE ind (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the active.

Example: Financial ACTIVE, Quality ACTIVE, Both ACTIVE
DimClarificationStatus CDI_ENC_CLAR_STATUS_REF_ID

Displays the status of the clarification.

Example: Retracted, Closed, Sent
DimClarificationStatus Clarification Status

Displays the status of the clarification.

Example: Retracted, Closed, Sent.
DimClarificationTemplate Clarification Template

Displays the template selected by the CDS while creating a clarification from the Template drop down on the Clarification Screen.

Example: Clinical Validation Clarification Template, Proc Clarification Template
DimClarificationTemplate TEMPLATE_BODY Displays the description of the template selected by the CDS while creating a clarification on the Clarification Screen.
DimClarificationType Clarification Type

Displays the 'Primary Type' of the clarification raised by the CDS.

Example: CC, CLIN VAL, Sepsis etc.

Note:
Both Standard and Custom Clarification types are considered.
DimClarificationType FINANCIAL_IMPACT

Displays Boolean value (True/False) as per the Financial Impact status selected in the Reconciliation Assessment screen.

Example: If CDS selects 'Financial Impact' in the Reconciliation Assessment DRG screen , FINANCIAL_IMPACT Column displays True.
DimClarificationType OTHER_IMPACT

Displays Boolean value (True/False) as per the Other Impact status selected in the Reconciliation Assessment screen.

Example: If CDS selects 'Other Impact' in the Reconciliation Assessment DRG screen , OTHER_IMPACT Column displays True.
DimClarificationType TYPE_DESCRIPTION

Displays the description of the 'Primary Type' selected by the CDS.

Example: Complication/Co-morbidity, Clinical Validation, Sepsis caused due to e-coli etc.

Note:
Both Standard and Custom clarification types are considered.
% Financial Impact Clarifications

Displays out of total clarifications sent, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications sent.

%Financial Impact Clarification = (Count of clarifications with Financial Impact Clarification Type / Total Clarifications Sent) x 100

Example: 56%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial ’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

DimCodeStatus CDI_CODE_STATUS_DESC

Displays the current status of the diagnosis/procedure code as per the action performed by the CDS on CDS Assistant from the application.

Example: accepted, rejected, hidden etc.
DimCodeStatus CDI_CODE_STATUS_ID

Displays the ID of the current status of the diagnosis/procedure codes as per the action performed by the CDS on CDS Assistant.

Example: Displays "A" for Accepted, "R" for Rejected, "H" for Hidden etc.
DimCodeStatus Code Status

Displays the current status of the diagnosis/procedure code as per the action performed by the CDS on CDS Assistant.

Example: Accepted, Rejected, Hidden etc.
DimInstanceResponse Clarification Response

Displays the final provider response on the clarification.

Example: Agreed, Alternative Specificity Diagnosis, Other Explanation.

Note:
In cases of multiple instances of a clarification, only the final response is displayed.
DimInstanceResponse RESPONSE_TYPE_ID

Displays the Response Type ID for the final response on the clarification.

Example: AGREED, ALTERNATIVE

_DIAGNOSIS, OTHER_EXPLANATION
DimOrganization ADAccount Do not use.
DimOrganization EXTERNAL_NAME Displays the External name as mentioned in the Organization Configuration screen.
DimOrganization Organization Displays the Organization description as mentioned in the Organization Configuration screen.
DimOrganization URI_IDENTIFIER Displays the URI Identifier value as mentioned in the Organization Configuration screen.
DimPayer Payer

Displays the Payer assigned to the encounter along with the Payer ID

Example: Payer Description (Payer ID)
DimPayer Payer Category

Displays the payer category as assigned on the Payer configuration screen.

Note:
Unassigned Category is displayed if no Payer Category is selected from the drop down on the payer configuration screen.
DimPayer Payer ID Displays the Payer ID as configured in the Payer configuration screen.
DimPayer Payer_Desc Displays the Payer Description as configured in the Payer configuration screen.
DimPSIAlertsGroupBy PSI_Alerts_GroupBy

Displays the Group By options from the Quality Alerts report.

Example: Encounter CDS, PSI Topic.
DimPSIAlertsGroupBy SORT_ORDER

Displays a numeric value for the Group by option as per their position in Quality Alerts report.

Example: SORT_ORDER = 1 if PSI_Alerts_GroupBy option is Encounter CDS, SORT_ORDER = 8 if PSI_Alerts_GroupBy option is Admit Quarter etc.
DimPSITopic Alert Category

Displays the Quality Alert category triggered for encounter.

Example: PSI, PDI, NQI

Note:
Blank is displayed if no Quality Alert is triggered.
DimPSITopic DESCRIPTION

Displays the description of the Quality Alert triggered.

Example: Iatrogenic Pneumothorax, Postop Sepsis etc.

Note:
Blank is displayed if no Quality Alert is triggered.
DimPSITopic Topic

Displays the Quality Alert topic triggered.

Example: PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax, PSI_13 Postop Sepsis etc
DimPSITopic TOPIC_ID

Displays the Topic ID associated with the Quality Alert topic.

Example: TOPIC_ID = 6 for 'PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax' Topic, TOPIC_ID = 10 for 'PDI_10 Pediatric Postop Sepsis' Topic etc.
DimROM ROM

Displays the ROM Value

Example: ROM 1, ROM 2 etc
DimROM ROM Description

Displays the description of the ROM value.

Example : Minor (if ROM Value is 1), Moderate (if ROM Value is 2)
DimROM ROM_Value

Displays the ROM Value

Example: 1, 2 ,3, 4
DimSOI ROM Description

Displays the description of the SOI value.

Example : Minor (if SOI Value is 1), Moderate (if SOI Value is 2)
DimSOI SOI

Displays the SOI Value

Example: SOI 1, SOI 2 etc
DimSOI SOI_Value

Displays the SOI Value

Example: 1, 2 ,3, 4
DimStatus Active Displays Boolean value
DimStatus CDI_STATUS_CODE

Displays the Status code as per the encounter status.

Example: D (if Encounter Status is Discharged), IP (if Encounter Status is In Progress)
DimStatus Encounter Status

Displays the encounter status.

Example: In Progress, Discharged, Review Complete etc.
DimStatus Status ID Do no use.
DimSuggestionType Suggestion Type

Displays the type of codes suggested by the engine.

Example: CC, HAC, PROC etc.

Note:
Multiple rows will be displayed if an encounter has more than one suggestion type suggested by the engine.
DimVisitType Visit Type

Displays the Visit Type of the encounter.

Example: Visit Type Description (Visit Type ID)

DimVisitType Visit Type Description

Displays the description of the Visit Type as configured in the Visit Type configuration screen.

Example: Inpatient
DimVisitType Visit Type Id

Displays the ID of the Visit Type as configured in the Visit Type configuration screen.

Example: I
DischargeDate Day_of_Month

Displays the numeric day of the month of the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge date is 3/21/2020, Day_of_Month is 21
DischargeDate Discharge Date

Displays the date when the patient was discharged.

Example: 9/19/2020
DischargeDate Month

Displays the month value of the Discharge Date.

Example: Feb, Jul etc.
DischargeDate Month_Name

Displays the month and year value of the Discharge Date.

Example: Mar 2019, Sep 2020 etc
DischargeDate Month of Year

Displays the numeric value of the month of the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge date is 8/12/2020, Month_of_Year is 8
DischargeDate Week

Displays the week range of the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge Date is 10/15/2019, Week is 10/13 - 10/19

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
DischargeDate Week_Name Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
DischargeDate Week_Of_Year

Displays the week number for the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge Date is 2/1/2021, Week_Of_Year is 6
DischargeDate WeekEND

Displays the last date of the week for the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge Date is 2/16/2021, WeekEND is 2/20/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
DischargeDate WeekStart

Displays the first date of the week for the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge Date is 2/16/2021, Weekstart is 2/14/2021

Note:
Sunday is considered the starting day of the week.
DischargeDate Year

Displays the year value for the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge Date is 2/16/2021, Year is 2021
Encounter Details #Encounter

Displays the count of encounters.

Example: #Encounter is 2 if there are 2 encounters with the same account number.

Encounter Details % CDS Enc Reviewed Displays out of total initial reviews performed, the percentage of encounters reviewed by the CDS.
Encounter Details % Codes Accepted

Out of the total codes suggested presented on CDS assistant, the percentage of codes that were accepted by the CDS.

% Codes Accepted = (Total count of codes accepted by the CDS / Total count of codes suggested). This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Codes Addressed

Out of total suggestions presented on CDS Assistant, this metric displays the percentage of suggestions that were addressed by the CDS.

% Codes Addressed = (Count of suggestions addressed by the CDS / Total count of suggestions presented on CDS Assistant).
Encounter Details % Codes Removed

Out of the total codes suggested presented on CDS assistant, the percentage of codes that were rejected/removed by the CDS.

% Codes Removed = (Total count of codes removed by the CDS / Total count of codes suggested). This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Codes Unaddressed Out of the total codes suggested presented on CDS Assistant, the count of codes that were unaddressed or no action was taken by the CDS for the selected 'View By' option.
Encounter Details % Discharged Encounter Reviewed

Displays out of total discharges, the percentage of encounters reviewed.

Example: 78%
Encounter Details % Encounters Ranked

Displays the count and percentage of encounters ranked for the selected time period.

% Encounters Ranked = (Count of encounters ranked/ Total Encounters) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Encounters with CC to MCC Shift

Displays the percentage of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC for the selected View By option.

% Encounters with CC to MCC Shift = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100.
Encounter Details % Encounters with Code Suggestions

Displays out of total discharges, the percentage of encounters that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant. Format: 78%.

% Encounters with Code Suggestions = (Count of encounters with at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant/Total count of discharges) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC

Displays the percentage of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC for the selected View By option.

% Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC = Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC / Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift x100
Encounter Details % Missed Concurrent Reviews Displays the percentage of encounters for which review was performed after discharge, meaning out of total encounters discharged, this metric displays the count of encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge for the selected View By option.

Missed Concurrent Reviews = Discharged encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge, that is, Initial Review Date/Time is Blank or Initial Review Date/Time > Discharge Date/Time.
Encounter Details % Missed Top Rank Reviews (Rank 1,2 and 6) Displays the count of encounters with the top rank as 1, 2, or 6 that were not reviewed by the CDS. These encounters don't have an initial review date/time and may or may not have a discharge date/time..

Missed Top Rank Reviews = Count of top-ranked encounters (Rank 1, 2, and 6) without an initial review, indicated by an empty or unspecified Initial Review Date/Time.
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Cases NCC After CDI

Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC.

% of Reconciled cases NCC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100

Rounded to 0 decimal places; Example: 55%

Note:
  • Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the NCC DRGs for the encounters.
  • When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Cases NCC and NULL After CDI

Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL

% of Reconciled cases NCC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100

Rounded to 0 decimal places; Example: 55%

Note:
  • Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the NCC and NULL DRGs for the encounters.
  • When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Encounter Details % of reconciled cases with Both Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Both Impact.

% of reconciled cases with Both Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Both Impact /The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100

Rounded to 0 decimal places

Example: 22%
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Cases with CC After CDI

Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC.

Formula: % of Reconciled cases with CC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100

Note:
  • Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the CC DRGs for the encounters.
  • When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Encounter Details % of reconciled cases with Financial Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Financial Impact.

% of reconciled cases with Financial Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Financial Impact / The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100.

Rounded to 0 decimal places

Example: 45%
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Cases with MCC After CDI

Out of total reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled), the percentage of reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC.

% of Reconciled cases with MCC After CDI = (Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC/ Total Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled)) *100

Rounded to 0 decimal places; Example: 55%

Note:
  • Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the MCC DRGs for the encounters.
  • When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Encounter Details % of reconciled cases with No Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as 'No Impact'.

% of reconciled cases with No Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as 'No Impact' / The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100

Rounded to 0 decimal places

Example: 5%
Encounter Details % of reconciled cases with SOI/ROM Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as SOI/ROM Impact.

% of reconciled cases with SOI/ROM Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as SOI/ROM Impact / The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100

Rounded to 0 decimal places

Example: 19%
Encounter Details % of reconciled cases with Unassigned Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Blank Impact Type

% of reconciled cases with Unassigned Impact = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Blank Impact Type/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100

Rounded to 0 decimal places

Example: 32%
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC and NULL Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC and NULL
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Medical Cases with CC Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as CC
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Medical Cases with MCC Out of total medical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as MCC
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC and NULL Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as NCC and NULL
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Surgical Cases with CC Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as CC
Encounter Details % of Reconciled Surgical Cases with MCC Out of total surgical reconciled cases (We consider all medical cases and not just positive), all Final DRGs as MCC
Encounter Details % Ranked Initial Reviews

Displays the count and percentage of ranked encounters reviewed for the selected time period

% Ranked Initial Reviews: ({Count of ranked encounters with an initial review date/time} /Total Count of Initial Reviews) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Ranked Encounters Reviewed

Displays the percentage of the ranked encounters reviewed for the selected "View By" option, out of the total ranked encounters.

% Ranked Encounters Reviewed: (Count of ranked encounters reviewed /Count of encounters ranked) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Reconciled Medical Cases
Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) which are Medical. % Reconciled Medical Cases = The total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact./ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places.Example: 7%
Note:
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical). Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.
Encounter Details % Reconciled Surgical Cases
Displays the percentage of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) which are Surgical. % Reconciled Medical Cases = The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact./ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) x 100. Rounded to 0 decimal places.Example: 10%
Note:
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical).Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.
Encounter Details % Reviewed Encounters with Code Suggestions

Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of encounters that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant. Format: 78%.
Encounter Details % Reviews by CDS

Displays the by cds from the % reviews raised by the CDS

Displays the by for the % Reviews cds (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the % reviews.

Example: Financial by, Quality by, Both by
Encounter Details % Suggestions Clarified

Out of the total suggestions that were presented on CDS Assistant, the percentage of codes for which CDS generated a clarification.

% Suggestions Clarified = (Total count of suggestions for which CDS generated a query / Total count of suggestions presented on CDS Assistant) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Unranked Encounters

The count of unranked encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.

% Unranked Encounters = (Count of encounters NOT ranked {Unranked Encounters}/ Total Encounters (Discharges)) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Unranked Initial Reviews

Displays the count and percentage of unranked encounters reviewed for the selected time period.

% Unranked Initial Reviews: ({Count of unranked encounters with an initial review date/time} /Total Count of Initial Reviews) X100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details % Unranked Encounters Reviewed

Displays the percentage of the ranked encounters reviewed for the selected "View By" option, out of the total ranked encounters.

% Unranked Encounters Reviewed: Unranked Encounters Reviewed / Encounters Ranked x 100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places. For example, 30%.
Encounter Details % Reviews by Financial Class Do not use.
Encounter Details Account Number Displays the account number.
Encounter Details Admission Date

Displays the admission date of the patient.

Example: 2/22/2020
Encounter Details Admission Date and Time

Displays the admission date of the patient.

Example: 2/22/2020
Encounter Details Admission Date and Time Display

Displays the admission date and time of the patient.

Example: 03/19/2020 12:00:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Admit Service Displays the Admit Service assigned to the encounter.
Encounter Details ADMIT_MONTH

Displays the Admit Month as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)
Encounter Details ADMIT_QUARTER

Displays the Admit Quarter as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Encounter Details ADMIT_WEEK

Displays the Admit Week as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_WEEK is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Encounter Details ADMIT_YEARMONTH

Displays the year and month as per the Admission Date.

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_YEARMONTH is 202009
Encounter Details Admitting Diagnosis

Displays the admitting Diagnosis assigned to the encounter.

If the Admitting Diagnosis is blank or null or is not available, the report displays Unassigned Admitting Diagnosis for the encounter.

Example: Unassigned Admitting Diagnosis
Encounter Details Age (Age at Admission) Displays the age of the patient during admission.
Encounter Details AGE_UNIT

This is field to specify the unit associated with the age value.

Example: y,m,d

Encounter Details All Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with all statuses including Review Not Needed.

Note:

When the Discharge Date is applied, then this displays the count of discharged encounters with all statuses including Review Not Needed.

When the Admit Date is applied, then this displays the count of admitted encounters with all statuses including Review Not Needed.
Encounter Details Assessment DRG

Displays the Reconciliation Assessment DRG code along with description from the Reconciliation Screen.

Example: 977 - HIV WITH OR WITHOUT OTHER RELATED CONDITION
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_AMLOS

Displays the AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_AMLOS_

ADVANCED

Displays the AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_CODE

Displays the DRG Code from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 777
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_CODE_

ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 147
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_DESCRIPTION

Displays the DRG Code description from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: Fever & inflammatory conditions
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_DESCRIPTION_

ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code description using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: FEVER AND INFLAMMATORY CONDITIONS
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_GMLOS

Displays the GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_GMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_GROUPER_TYPE

Displays the DRG Grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: APR_DRG, CMS etc.
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_GROUPER_TYPE_

ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Grouper using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: APR_DRG, CMS etc.
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_GROUPER_VERSION

Displays the DRG Grouper Version from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 38.1, 37.0 etc.
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_GROUPER_VERSION_

ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Grouper Version using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 38.1, 37.0 etc.
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_MDC

Displays the MDC value from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 18
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_MDC_ADVANCED

Displays the MDC value using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 25
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_MDC_DESCRIPTION

Displays the MDC description from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: Infectious and parasitic diseases, systemic or unspecified sites
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_MDC_DESCRIPTION

_ADVANCED

Displays the MDC description using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: HUMAN IMMUNODEFICIENCY VIRUS INFECTIONS
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_REMB

Displays the Reimbursement value (in $) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 26.42
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_REMB_ADVANCED

Displays the Reimbursement value (in $) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 141.2
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_ROM

Displays Risk of Mortality (ROM) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 2
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_ROM_ADVANCED

Displays Risk of Mortality (ROM) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 3
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_SOI

Displays Severity of Illness (SOI) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 1
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_SOI_ADVANCED

Displays Severity of Illness (SOI) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 4
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_WT

Displays relative weight value from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 1.1478
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_DRG_WT_ADVANCED

Displays relative weight value using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 4.587
Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_MEDICAL_SURGICAL

Displays DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details ASSESSMENT_MEDICAL_SURGICAL_

ADVANCED

Displays DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details ASSIGNED_AND_NEVER_REVIEWED

Displays the total count of encounters which were assigned to a CDS but there was no initial review.

Example: 47
Encounter Details

Avg. Ranked Review TAT (Hours)

Displays the average Ranked Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e the time it takes the CDS to complete a review for a ranked encounter, i.e. the number of hours between Review Complete Date/Time and when the Working Review was first created.

Avg. Ranked Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review TAT (Hours) of all the ranked reviewed encounters / Ranked Encounters Reviewed).
Encounter Details Avg. Review TAT (Hours) Displays the average Review Turnaround Time (TAT) in hours for the selected "View By" option. Review TAT represents the time taken by the CDS to complete a review for an encounter, calculated as the number of hours between the Review Complete (Date/Time) and the initial creation of the Working Review.

Avg. Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review TAT (Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed).
Encounter Details Avg. Suggestions per Reviewed Encounter

Displays the average count of suggestions presented on CDS Assistant for every encounter that has an initial review date/time assigned to it.
Encounter Details Avg. Unranked Review TAT (Hours)

Displays the average Unranked Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e. the time it takes the CDS to complete a review for a unranked encounter, i.e. the number of hours between Review Complete Date/Time and when the working review was first created.

Avg. Unranked Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review TAT (Hours) of all the unranked reviewed encounters / Unranked Encounters Reviewed).
Encounter Details Attending Provider

Displays the provider/physician attending the patient.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Encounter Details Auto Reconcile Date Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'Auto Reconciled'.

Example: 2/14/2024.
Encounter Details Auto Reconcile Date and Time Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'Auto Reconciled'.

Example: 2/14/2024.
Encounter Details Auto Reconcile Date and Time Display Displays the date and time when encounter status is set as 'Auto Reconciled'.

Example: 03/05/2024 06:40:11 AM ET.

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Billed DRG

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG code along with description after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 977 - HIV WITH OR WITHOUT OTHER RELATED CONDITION

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_AMLOS

Displays the Final Coded Summary AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 5.00

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_AMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 8.00

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_CODE

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Code after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 777

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_CODE_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Code using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 147

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Code description after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: Fever & inflammatory conditions

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_DESCRIPTION_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Code description using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: FEVER AND INFLAMMATORY CONDITIONS

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_GMLOS

Displays the Final Coded Summary GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 5.00

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_GMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 8.00

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_GROUPER_TYPE

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: APR_DRG, CMS etc.

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_GROUPER_TYPE_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Grouper using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: APR_DRG, CMS etc.

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_GROUPER_VERSION

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Grouper Version after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 38.1, 37.0 etc.

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_GROUPER_VERSION

_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Grouper Version using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 38.1, 37.0 etc.

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_MDC

Displays the Final Coded Summary MDC value after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 18

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_MDC_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary MDC value using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 25

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_MDC_DESCRIPTION

Displays the Final Coded Summary MDC description after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: Infectious and parasitic diseases, systemic or unspecified sites

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_MDC_DESCRIPTION_

ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary MDC description using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: HUMAN IMMUNODEFICIENCY VIRUS INFECTIONS

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_REMB

Displays the Final Coded Summary Reimbursement value (in $) after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 26.42

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_REMB_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary Reimbursement value (in $) using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 141.2

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_ROM

Displays the Final Coded Summary Risk of Mortality (ROM) after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 2

Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_ROM_ADVANCED

Example: 3

Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.

Displays the Final Coded Severity of Illness (SOI) after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 1

Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_SOI_ADVANCED

Displays Final Coded Summary Severity of Illness (SOI) using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 4

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.

Displays the Final Coded Summary relative weight value after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 1.1478

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_DRG_WT_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary relative weight value using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: 4.587

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_MEDICAL_SURGICAL

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: M, S

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details BILLED_MEDICAL_SURGICAL_ADVANCED

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) using Advanced grouper after Post Discharge review is done.

Example: M, S

Note:
Information related to Billed data is not displayed on the UI/application.
Encounter Details Birth Weight

Displays the birth weight of the patient.

Example: 15.54
Encounter Details BLENDED_RATE

Displays the blended rate as configured in the Payer configuration screen.

Example: 1500

Note:
If Blended Rate is blank/unavailable, Operating Federal Rate is used for reimbursement calculations.
Encounter Details CDS

Displays the name of the CDS.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Encounter Details CDS Encounter Count Displays the count of assigned encounters for which a review is performed.
Encounter Details CDS Initial Review Displays the count of assigned encounters for which an initial review is done.
Encounter Details CDS WORKING REVIEW OR DISCOVERED DX Displays the list of all CDS Working Review or Discovered DX. Multiple values are displayed comma separated. These are the diagnosis codes as suggested by the CLU engine or manually added.
Note:

Diagnosis codes suggested by the engine are displayed in blue hyperlink in the Triage Worklist

Diagnosis codes manually added are displayed in black in the Triage Worklist.

Partial codes are displayed in upper-case, and fully qualified codes are displayed in mixed-case (upper and lower).
Encounter Details CDS/Coder Match Rate

Displays the CDS/Coder Match Rate .

CDS/Coder Match Rate = (Count of Reconciled Encounters with Match =Y / Count of Reconciled Encounters in the selected date range) *100

Example: 45%
Encounter Details Chart Impact Rate

Out of total encounters, the percentage of Financial Impact Clarifications agreed with Final Response as Agreed.

Chart Impact Rate = (Count of Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed with Final response as Agreed /Total Encounters) *100

Rounded to 0 decimal places. Example: 45%

Financial Impact Clarifications Agreed = The count of sent Financial Impact clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

Note:
  • Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.
  • Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.
  • Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
  • Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.

Total Encounters= The total count of encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.

Note:
  • When the Discharge Date is applied, then this displays the count of discharged encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.
  • When the Admit Date is applied, then this displays the count of admitted encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.
Encounter Details Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications Count of encounters with at least one clarification instance with Final Response as No Response for the selected time period.
Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial’ in the admin configuration is a Financial Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details CMI Shift of Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications

Displays shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) that have at-least one impact clarifications with Final Response as 'No Response'

CMI Shift of Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications= CALCULATE(([Overall CMI After CDI]- [Overall CMI Before CDI]), 'Encounter Details'[IS_RECONCILED]=1, 'Clarification Details'[CLAR_NORESPONSE]=1

This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Example: 4.1478
Encounter Details Coder

Displays the name of the CDS.

Example: Last Name, First Name

Encounter Details Codes Accepted Displays the count and percentage of codes accepted by the CDS for the selected time period.
Encounter Details Codes Addressed

Displays the count and percentage of suggestions that were addressed by the CDS for the selected time period.
Encounter Details Codes Presented on CDS Assistant Displays the total count of AI suggestion codes presented on CDS Assistant for the selected View By option.
Encounter Details Codes Removed

Displays the count and percentage of codes removed by the CDS for the selected time period.
Encounter Details Codes Unaddressed The count of AI suggestions that were unaddressed by the CDS. % Unaddressed = Codes Unaddressed / Codes Presented on CDS Assistant x 100 (Rounded to 0 decimal places). E.g. 30%.
Encounter Details Coding DRG

Displays the Final Coded Summary DRG code along with description from the Reconciliation Screen.

Example: 977 - HIV WITH OR WITHOUT OTHER RELATED CONDITION
Encounter Details Coding MDC

Displays the Final Coded Summary MDC code along with description from the Reconciliation Screen.

Example: 18 - INFECTIOUS & PARASITIC DISEASES, SYSTEMIC OR UNSPECIFIED SITES
Encounter Details Coding Status Displays the Final Coded Summary Status code along with description from the Reconciliation Screen.

Example: 06 - DISEASES & DISORDERS OF THE DIGESTIVE SYSTEM
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_AMLOS

Displays the AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_AMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_CODE

Displays the DRG Code from the Final Coded Summary

Example: 777
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_CODE_ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 147
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_DESCRIPTION

Displays the DRG Code description from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: Fever & inflammatory conditions
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_DESCRIPTION_ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code description using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: FEVER AND INFLAMMATORY CONDITIONS
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_GMLOS

Displays the GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_GMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_MDC

Displays the MDC value from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 18
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_MDC_ADVANCED

Displays the MDC value using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 25
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_MDC_DESCRIPTION

Displays the MDC description from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: Infectious and parasitic diseases, systemic or unspecified sites
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_MDC_DESCRIPTION

_ADVANCED

Displays the MDC description using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: HUMAN IMMUNODEFICIENCY VIRUS INFECTIONS
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_REMB

Displays the Reimbursement value (in $) from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 26.42
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_REMB_ADVANCED

Displays the Reimbursement value (in $) using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 141.2
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_ROM

Displays Risk of Mortality (ROM) from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 2
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_ROM_ADVANCED

Displays Risk of Mortality (ROM) using Advanced grouper from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 3
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_SOI

Displays Severity of Illness (SOI) from the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 1
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_SOI_ADVANCED

Displays Severity of Illness (SOI) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 4
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_WT

Displays relative weight value from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 1.1478
Encounter Details CODING_DRG_WT_ADVANCED

Displays relative weight value using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 4.587
Encounter Details CODING_MEDICAL_SURGICAL

Displays DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details CODING_MEDICAL_SURGICAL_ADVANCED

Displays DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) using Advanced grouper from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details Concate Clarification Type

Displays the list of both standard and custom Clarification types.

Example: CC, POA, Generic etc.

Note:
Multiple clarification types is displayed comma separated.
Encounter Details CONCATE_ENC_IMPACT_CLAR_AGREE_

RATE_KPI

 Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details CONCATE_ENC_IMPACT_CLAR_RATE_KPI Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details CONCATE_ENC_IMPACT_CLAR_RESP_

RATE_KPI

 Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details CONCATE_PD_IMP_RATE_KPI

Displays the count and percentage of reviewed encounters for which the post-discharge review resulted in a higher reimbursement

Count: Out of total 'Encounters with Impact Opportunity', the count of encounters with Final Billed DRG WT greater than the Final Coded DRG WT.

Percentage: (Encounters Impacted / Encounters with Impact Opportunity) x 100) = ( Count of encounters with Final Billed DRG WT greater than the Final Coded DRG WT / Count of encounters with at-least one post-discharge review opportunity identified) x 100) Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 50 (75%)
Encounter Details CONCATE_PD_REV_RATE_KPI

Displays the count and percentage of encounters reviewed by the post-discharge case reviewer.

Count: Out of total 'Encounters with Impact Opportunity', the count of encounters with at-least one resolved opportunity or 'No Further Action Required' checked.

Percentage: (Encounters Reviewed/ Encounters with Impact Opportunity) x 100) = (Count of encounters with at-least one resolved opportunity / Count of encounters with at-least one post-discharge review opportunity identified) x 100) Rounded to 0 decimal places

Example: 50 (75%)
Encounter Details Concurrent CMI After CDI

Displays the average of Possible DRG weights of all encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI After CDI = (Sum of Possible DRG WTs [or Working DRG WTs when Possible DRG is blank] of all encounters that have an initial review date and are in the status of Status:In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold. / Count of encounters that have an initial review date and of Status: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.)

Example: 4.1254

Note:
Encounters with status In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold for which Working DRG is blank are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Concurrent CMI Before CDI

Displays the average of Working DRG weights of all encounters that have an initial review date and Status of In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI Before CDI = (Sum of Working DRG WTs of all encounters that have an initial review date and are in the status of Status:In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold. / Count of encounters that have an initial review date and are in the status of In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.)

Example: 2.157

Note:
Encounters with status In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold for which Working DRG is blank are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Concurrent CMI Shift

Displays the shift in weight between Possible DRG and Working DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI Shift= (Concurrent CMI After CDI- Concurrent CMI Before CDI)

Example: 1.9684

Note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Concurrent CMI Shift (%)

Displays the percentage shift in weight between Possible DRG and Working DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI Shift(%) = (Concurrent CMI After CDI- Concurrent CMI Before CDI /Concurrent CMI Before CDI) *100

Example: 91%

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Concurrent CMI Shift (%) at 75%

Displays the percentage shift at 75% in weight between Possible DRG and Working DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and Status of: In Progress, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Concurrent CMI Shift (%) at 75% = (Concurrent CMI After CDI- Concurrent CMI Before CDI /Concurrent CMI Before CDI) *0.75

Example: 68%

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Negative ‘Potential CMI Shift at 75%’ is displayed in the red font.
Encounter Details CONCURRENT_ENCOUNTERS

This is a binary field to identify and indicate Concurrent Encounters.

When used in report, displays the total count of Concurrent encounters
Encounter Details Constant Do not use.
Encounter Details Count of Matched Encounters

Displays the total count of reconciled encounters where Final Coded DRG matches with Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG = Blank)

CDS/Coder Match Value= Y when when the Final Coded DRG matches Possible DRG. (Working DRG if Possible DRG= Blank)

Example: 2
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Cases NCC After CDI Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC
Note:
  • Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the NCC DRGs for the encounters
  • When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Cases NCC and NULL After CDI Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL
Note:
  • Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the DRG Specialty for the encounters.
  • When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Cases with CC After CDI

Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as CC.

Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the DRG Specialty for the encounters.

Note:
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, CDE Analytics considers the Working DRG value.

Example: DRG 200 PNEUMOTHORAX WITH CC; DRG 217 CARDIAC VALVE AND OTHER MAJOR CARDIOTHORACIC PROCEDURES WITH CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION WITH CC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Cases with MCC After CDI

Count of Reconciled encounters (encounter status as Reconciled Impact, Reconciled-No Impact, or Auto Reconciled) with Final Coded DRGs as MCC.

Advanced DRG is used when Primary is not MS DRG to identify the DRG Specialty for the encounters.

Note:
When Final Coded DRG is Blank or null, consider Working DRG value.

Example: 280 ACUTE MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION, DISCHARGED ALIVE WITH MCC; 286 CIRCULATORY DISORDERS EXCEPT AMI, WITH CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION WITH MCC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Encounters with MS DRG Shift

Displays the count of reconciled encounters with MS DRG Shift for the selected View By option.

The count of reconciled encounters that have a MS DRG Shift and have status as Reconciled Impact (Impact Type = Financial, Both, or Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT).
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC
Note:
  • Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 836 ACUTE LEUKEMIA WITHOUT MAJOR O.R. PROCEDURES WITHOUT CC/MCC; 842 LYMPHOMA AND NON-ACUTE LEUKEMIA WITHOUT CC/MCC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Medical Cases NCC and NULL Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL.
Note:
  • Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 839 CHEMOTHERAPY WITH ACUTE LEUKEMIA AS SECONDARY DIAGNOSIS WITHOUT CC/MCC; 311 ANGINA PECTORIS
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Medical Cases with CC Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as CC
Note:
  • Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)

  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical

  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation

Example: 121 ACUTE MAJOR EYE INFECTIONS WITH CC/MCC; 147 EAR, NOSE, MOUTH AND THROAT MALIGNANCY WITH CC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Medical Cases with MCC Count of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as MCC.
Note:
  • Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 283 ACUTE MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION, EXPIRED WITH MCC; 288 ACUTE AND SUBACUTE ENDOCARDITIS WITH MCC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC
Note:
  • Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
  • OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 320 OTHER ENDOVASCULAR CARDIAC VALVE PROCEDURES WITHOUT MCC; 340 APPENDECTOMY WITH COMPLICATED PRINCIPAL DIAGNOSIS WITHOUT CC/MCC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases NCC and NULL The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as NCC and NULL
Note:
  • Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
  • OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 334 RECTAL RESECTION WITHOUT CC/MCC; 265 AICD LEAD PROCEDURES
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases with CC The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as CC
Note:
  • Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
  • OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 217 CARDIAC VALVE AND OTHER MAJOR CARDIOTHORACIC PROCEDURES WITH CARDIAC CATHETERIZATION WITH CC; 240 AMPUTATION FOR CIRCULATORY SYSTEM DISORDERS EXCEPT UPPER LIMB AND TOE WITH CC
Encounter Details Count of Reconciled Surgical Cases with MCC The total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact and Final Coded DRGs as MCC
Note:
  • Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S)
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical
  • If M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical
  • OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical
  • Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Example: 335 PERITONEAL ADHESIOLYSIS WITH MCC; 344 MINOR SMALL AND LARGE BOWEL PROCEDURES WITH MCC
Encounter Details Count of Unmatched Encounters

Displays the total count of reconciled encounters where Final Coded DRG does not match with Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG = Blank)

CDS/Coder Match Value= N when when the Final Coded DRG does not match Possible DRG. (Working DRG if Possible DRG= Blank)

Example: 4
Encounter Details CSN

This displays the list of CSN values for the encounter.

Note:
Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Encounter Details Department

Displays the Department ID as configured in the Departments configuration screen.

Example: CARD

Note:
Unassigned Department is displayed when there is no department configured.
Encounter Details Department Description

Displays the Department description as configured in the Departments configuration screen.

Example: Cardiology

Note:
Unassigned Department is displayed when there is no department configured.
Encounter Details Discharge

Displays flag value if patient is discharged or no.

Example: Done, Not Done.

Done is displayed if patient is already discharged.
Encounter Details Discharge Date

Displays the discharge date of the patient.

Example: 6/10/2020
Encounter Details Discharge Date and Time

Displays the discharge date of the patient.

Example: 6/10/2021
Encounter Details Discharge Date and Time Display

Displays the discharge date and time of the patient.

Example: 03/19/2020 12:00:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Discharge Status Displays the Discharge Status assigned to the encounter in the format 'Discharge Status ID - Discharge Status Description'.

Example: 20 - Expired
Encounter Details Discharge Status Description

Displays the Discharge Status description as configured in the Discharge Status configuration screen.

Example: Discharged/transferred to skilled nursing facility (SNF)

Encounter Details Discharge Status ID

Displays the Discharge Status ID as configured in the Discharge Status configuration screen.

Example: 01, 03, etc.
Encounter Details DISCHARGE_MONTH

Displays the Discharge Month as per the Discharge Date .

Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)
Encounter Details DISCHARGE_QUARTER

Displays the Discharge Quarter as per the Discharge Date .

Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Encounter Details DISCHARGE_WEEK

Displays the Discharge Week as per the Discharge Date .

Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_WEEK is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Encounter Details DISCHARGE_YEARMONTH

Displays the year and month as per the Discharge Date.

Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_YEARMONTH is 202009
Encounter Details DISCHARGE1

This is flag indicating if the encounter has been discharged.

Example: Displays 1 for discharged encounters.
Encounter Details DM Assigned Never Reviewed

Displays total count of assigned encounters with blank Initial Review Date and encounter status as 'Review Not Needed'.

Example: 45

Note:
Binary value (0/1) is displayed at encounter level.
Encounter Details DM Concurrent Encounters

Displays the count of encounters with Initial Review Date/Time and status as In Progress, Review Complete, Ready to Reconcile and Reconciliation-Hold.
Encounter Details DM Enc With OverDue Clar Do not use.
Encounter Details DM Un Assigned Discharge

Displays the total count of Unassigned at Discharged encounters.

Example: 45

Note:
Binary value (0/1) is displayed at encounter level.
Encounter Details DM Unassigned Encounter

Displays the count of unassigned encounters.

Unassigned Encounters: Encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.

Note:
CDS is "Unassigned CDS" or "Blank".

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Encounter Details DOB

Displays the Date of Birth.

Example: 1/13/1990
Encounter Details DRG Reimb Before CDI If R-DRG - blank, use Working
Encounter Details DRG Type

Displays the DRG type.

Example: M, S, U
Encounter Details DRG Type Description

Displays the description of the DRG Type.

Example: Medical, Surgical etc.
Encounter Details DRG WT After CDI

Displays the total DRG WT from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 284.75
Encounter Details DRG WT Before CDI

Displays the total DRG WT from Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 157.24
Encounter Details Enc with Clar Sent

Do not use.

Use 'Encounters with Clarifications' field.
Encounter Details ENC_Encounters With Financial Impact Clarifications Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details ENC_Financial Impact Clarifications Sents Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details ENC_WO_REVIEWS Encounter w/o reviews; Binary Flag
Encounter Details Encounter Additional Review Dates Dynamic

Displays the date when additional review is performed.

Example: 9/17/2020, 9/19/2020
Encounter Details Encounter Additional Reviews

Displays the count of additional reviews performed.

Example: 100
Encounter Details Encounter Count

Displays the total count of encounters.

Example: 400
Encounter Details Encounter Discharge

Displays the total count of discharges.

Example: 22
Encounter Details Encounter Impact Clarification Rate

Displays out of total encounters , the percentage count of encounters with Impact Clarifications.

Example: 45%

Encounter Impact Clarification Rate = (Encounters with Impact Clarifications/#Encounter) X 100
Encounter Details Encounter Initial Reviews Displays total count of encounters for which Initial Review is performed.
Encounter Details Encounter Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the Reimbursement Impact ($) at the encounter level.

Encounter Reimbursement Impact ($) = Encounter Variance* Blended Rate

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Negative ‘Reimbursement Impact ($)’ is displayed in the red font.
Encounter Details Encounter Reimbursement Impact Clarification Rate Do not use.
Encounter Details Encounter Reimbursement Impact_Derived Displays the $ value calculating the difference between Final Coded and Reimbursement Assessment. Encounter Reimbursement Impact_Derived = (Final Coded Reimbursement - Reconciliation Assessment Reimbursement)

Example: $(20,000.00 - 17,000.00) = $3,000.00.
Encounter Details Encounter Status

Displays the list of encounter status available.

Example: Auto Reconciled, Discharged, In Progress
Encounter Details Encounter Total Reviews

Displays the total reviews performed on the encounter.

Example: 1, 2 etc.
Encounter Details Encounter Variance

Displays the shift in the weight at the encounter level.

Encounter Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

For encounters with blank Final DRG WT, Encounter Variance = Possible DRG WT - Working DRG WT ( If Possible DRG/WT is blank, Working DRG WT is considered. In this case Encounter Variance will always be zero).

Note:
Encounter Variance can be negative, positive, or zero.

Negative ‘Variance’ is displayed in the red font Example: 1.0178.

Encounter Variance is not calculated for the encounters that do not have an initial review date.

Review Not Needed Encounters are not considered.

Rounded to 4 decimal places. Example: 1.0178
Encounter Details Encounter with Initial Review Displays the total count of initial reviews performed on the encounter.
Encounter Details Encounters Ranked

Displays the count and percentage of encounters ranked for the selected time period.
Encounter Details ENCOUNTER_WITH_FINANCIAL_CLARIFICATION

Displays boolean value (True/False) if encounter has a financial impact clarification sent.

Example: True is displayed in cases of encounters with financial impact clarifications.
Encounter Details Encounters Moved from IP to OP Displays the count of encounters reviewed for which visit type was updated resulting in patient type to be updated from IP to OP.
Encounter Details Encounters Moved from OP to IP Displays the count of encounters reviewed for which visit type was updated resulting in patient type to be updated from OP to IP.
Encounter Details Encounters with CC to MCC Shift Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a CC and the final coded DRG is MCC.
Encounter Details Encounters with Code Suggestions

Displays out of total discharges, the percentage of encounters that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant. Format: 78%.
Encounter Details Encounters with concurrent Reviews

Displays the total concurrent reviews performed.

Example: 45
Encounter Details Encounters with No CC to CC or MCC

Count of Reconciled Encounters with DRG Shift in which the pre CDI DRG is a No CC and the final coded DRG is either CC or MCC.
Encounter Details Encounters with No Response Impact Clarifications

Displays the count of encounters (Reconciled Impact , Auto Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact) that have at-least one impact clarifications with Final Response as 'No Response'.

Example: 24

Note:
Impact Clarifications: Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as ‘Financial or BOTH’ in the admin configuration.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Encounters with Overdue Clarifications

Displays the count of encounters that have at least one Clarification with the status as Overdue.

Example: 21

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Agreed Do not use.
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Agreed Only Do not use.
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications Do not use.
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications Agreed Rate Do not use.
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications Rate

Displays out of total initial reviews done, the percentage of encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications

Example: 57%
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications Responded Rate

Displays out of total encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications, the percentage of encounters with Reimbursement Impact Clarifications Responded

Example: 75%
Encounter Details Encounters with Reimbursement Impact Responded Do not use.
Encounter Details Encounters with Retrospective Reviews Displays the total count of Retrospective Reviews performed.
Encounter Details Encounters with SEV Impact Clarifications

Displays the count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED.

Example: 25

Note:
Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Encounters with Tracking Code

Displays the count of encounters with at least one Tracking Code.

Example: 25
Encounter Details Encounters without Reimbursement Impact Agreed Do not use.
Encounter Details Est. Expected Complication Rate After CDI

Displays the average of Est. Expected Complication Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).
Encounter Details Est. Expected Complication Rate Before CDI

Displays the average of Est. Expected Complication Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Complication Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

Encounter Details Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI

Displays the average of Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Mortality Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places E.g., 0.84%). Note: The value is in %.
Encounter Details Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI

Displays the average of Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Mortality Rate Before CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Mortality Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).
Encounter Details Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI

Displays the average of Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI for the selected View By option.

Est. Expected Readmission Rate After CDI = The sum of CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.84%).

Encounter Details Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI

Displays the average of Est. Expected Readmission Rate Before CDI for the selected View By option.

Est.
