Expected Readmission Rate Before CD = The sum of CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the CareChex Expected Readmission Rate values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 0.56%).

Encounter Details Expected Discharge Date Displays the expected discharge date of a patient. Example: 01/10/2023.
Note:
Expected discharge date is calculated using the Admit Date and Working GMLOS, i.e. Expected Discharge Date = Admission Date + Working GMLOS (in days).
Encounter Details

Expected Discharge Date and Time Display

 Displays the expected discharge date and time of a patient. Example: 1/10/2022 12:25:00 PM ET.
Note:
Expected discharge date is calculated using the Admit Date and Working GMLOS, i.e. Expected Discharge Date = Admission Date and Time Display + Working GMLOS (in days).
Encounter Details F MS-DRG Displays both code and description of the Final Coded MS-DRG along with the description displayed on the Reconciliation page. Example: 872 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITHOUT MAJOR COMPLICATION OR COMORBIDITY (MCC).
Note:
This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time'.
Encounter Details F MS-DRG WT

Displays the WT associated with the Final Coded MS-DRG displayed on the Reconciliation page.

Example: 1.0393.

Note:
This column is blank for the encounters that do not have a ‘Initial Review Date/Time'.
Encounter Details S-DRG Code The suggested DRG value assigned to an encounter. Example: 562.
Encounter Details S-DRG Description The description of suggested DRG value. Example: MEDICAL BACK PROBLEMS WITHOUT MCC.
Encounter Details S-DRG Grouper Type The grouper type of suggested DRG value. Example: APR_DRG.
Encounter Details F MS-DRG Type Displays the Final Coded MS-DRG type displayed on the Reconciliation page.
Encounter Details F MS-DRG AMLOS

Displays the AMLOS associated with the Final Coded MS DRG.

Example: 3.1.
Encounter Details F MS-DRG GMLOS

Displays the GMLOS associated with the Final Coded MS DRG.

Example: 3.2.
Encounter Details S-DRG GMLOS Displays the geometric mean length of stay (GMLOS) associated with the Suggested DRG.
Encounter Details F_DRG_AMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay (AMLOS) from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 3.4569

Note:
Advanced AMLOS is used if Primary AMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details F_DRG_GMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Geometric Mean Length of Stay (GMLOS) from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 2.7789

Note:
Advanced GMLOS is used if Primary GMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details F_DRG_MDC_Derived

Displays the list of Major Diagnostic Category (MDC) from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 01, 09, 15, 25 etc.

Note:
Advanced MDC is used if Primary MDC is blank.
Encounter Details F_DRG_ROM_Derived

Displays the total Rate of Mortality (ROM) from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 146

Note:
Advanced ROM is used if Primary ROM is blank.
Encounter Details F_DRG_SOI_Derived

Displays the total Severity of Illness (SOI) from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: 154

Note:
Advanced SOi is used if Primary SOI is blank.
Encounter Details Facility ID

Displays the Facility ID as configured in the Facility Configuration screen.

Example: BCH, default facility
Encounter Details Facility Name

Displays the Facility name as configured in the Facility Configuration screen.

Example: Bradshaw Children's Hospital, Default Facility
Encounter Details Final Coded Reimbursement Displays the $ value from the final coded summary section in the. application.

Example: $20,000.00
Encounter Details Final PDX

Displays the list of Primary Diagnosis CM Code from Final Coded Summary section.

Example: A209, H44022 etc.
Encounter Details Financial Class

Displays the Financial Class description as configured in the Financial Class Configuration screen.

Example: Medicare
Encounter Details Financial ClassÂ  ID

Displays the Financial Class ID as configured in the Financial Class Configuration screen.

Example: Medicare
Encounter Details Financial Impact Clarification Types Displays the type of financial impact clarification sent for the encounter.

Example: CC, PDX
Encounter Details Financial Impact Clarification Types Agreed Displays the type of financial impact clarifications that have the Final response as Agreed.

Example: CC, PDX
Encounter Details FINANCIAL_IMPACT_CLARIFICATION Displays total count of Financial Impact Clarifications.
Encounter Details FINANCIAL_IMPACT_CLARIFICATION_AGR_

ALTDIAG_OTHEXP

This is a binary flag to identify and indicate the Financial Impact Clarifications with Agreed, Alternate Diagnosis or Other Explanation Response types.

Example: 0, 1
Encounter Details Follow-up Date and Time

Displays the follow-up time as entered by the CDS when they review and save the encounter. Applicable only when the status is In Progress.

Example: 6/29/2021
Encounter Details Follow-up Date and Time Display

Displays the follow-up date and time as entered by the CDS when they review and save the encounter. Applicable only when the status is In Progress.

Example: 6/29/2021 08:00:00 PM ET
Encounter Details From Visit Type Displays the value the visit type was changed from for the encounter.
Encounter Details Gender

Displays the gender of the patient.

Example: M, F etc.
Encounter Details GMLOS Before CDI

Displays the average of GMLOS Before CDI for the selected View By option.

GMLOS Before CDI = The sum of GMLOS values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled and Reconciled- No Impact and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Unassigned Impact with no shift in the WT) encounters and the GMLOS values associated with the Reconciliation assessment MS-DRG (or Working MS-DRG when Reconciliation Assessment Info is not available) of all Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact with shift in the WT) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 1.41)
Encounter Details GMLOS After CDI

Displays the average of GMLOS After CDI for the selected View By option.

GMLOS After CDI = The sum of GMLOS values associated with the Final Coded MS-DRGs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, Unassigned) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 2 decimal places. E.g., 3.60).
Encounter Details GMLOS Variance

Displays the average of GMLOS Variance for the selected View By option.
Encounter Details Grouper

Displays the Grouper type along with the version associated with the encounter.

Example: APR DRG 37.0, CMS 38.0
Encounter Details Grouper Type

Displays the Grouper type of the grouper associated with the encounter.

Example: APR , CMS , LTCH etc.
Encounter Details Grouper Version

Displays the Grouper Version of the grouper associated with the encounter.

Example: 37.0 , 38.0 etc
Encounter Details Highest Rank

Displays the list of Highest Ranks assigned to the encounters.

Example: No Rank, Rank 1, Rank 2
Encounter Details Highest_Rank Displays the Highest rank assigned to the encounter.
Encounter Details Highest_Rank_Sort_Order This is the field that is used to sort the Rank fields with Highest Rank value on top.
Encounter Details Impact Clarification Rate Do not use.
Encounter Details Impact Opportunities Identified

Displays the post review impact opportunities identified by the reviewer.

Example: No Discharge Summary, No Reimbursable Secondary Dx, Weekend Admission/Discharge

Note:
For an encounter with multiple impact opportunities identified, values are displayed comma separated.
Encounter Details Impact Type

Displays the type of the impact that is caused after the CDS's work on the encounter.

Example: Financial Impact, SOI/ROM Impact
Encounter Details In Progress Date Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'In Progress'.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details In Progress Date and Time Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'In Progress'.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details In Progress Date and Time Display Displays the date and time when encounter status is set as 'In Progress'.

Example: 03/05/2024 06:40:11 AM ET.

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Initial Imported Date and Time

Displays the time for which the Final Coded Summary was intially imported.

Example: 6/29/2021
Encounter Details Initial Imported Date and Time Display

Displays the time and date for which the Final Coded Summary was intially imported.

Example: 6/29/2021 08:00:00 PM ET
Encounter Details Initial Review

Displays flag value if Initial Review is performed or no.

Example: Done, Not Done.

Done is displayed if initial review is performed.
Encounter Details Initial Review CDS

Displays the name of the CDS who performed the Initial Review.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Encounter Details Initial Review Date

Displays the date when Initial Review was performed by the CDS.

Example: 2/17/2020

Encounter Details Initial Review Date and Time

Displays the date when Initial Review was performed by the CDS.

Example: 2/17/2021
Encounter Details Initial Review Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when Initial Review was performed by the CDS.

Example: 03/05/2021 06:40:11 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Initial Review DateTime Sort

Displays the initial review date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
Encounter Details Initial Review TAT (Days)

Displays the Initial Review Turn Around Time in days, i.e., number of days between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.

(Initial Review TAT (days) for an encounter = Initial Review Date - Admit Date) days

Note:
If patient is discharged before 24 hours, the Initial Review TAT (Days) =0

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Encounter Details Initial Review TAT (Hours)

Displays the Initial Review Turn Around Time in hours, i.e. number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.

(Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Encounter Details Initial Review Timing

Displays the type of review based on when Initial Review is done by the CDS.

Example:

If Initial Review is done after patient discharge, Retrospective Review (Initial Review Date/Time > Discharge Date/Time) is displayed.

If Initial Review is done before patient discharge, Concurrent Review (Initial Review Date/Time < Discharge Date/Time) is displayed.
Encounter Details IS_NON_RECONCILED

This is a Binary flag to indicate and identify "Non Reconciled" encounters.

Example: Displays 1 for Not Reconciled Encounters.

Encounter Details IS_PDRG_EMPTY

This is a Binary to indicate and identify blank Possible DRG field.

Example: Displays 1 for empty Possible DRG field.
Encounter Details IS_RECONCILED

This is a Binary flag to indicate and identify "Reconciled" encounters.

Example: Displays 1 for Reconciled Encounters.

Encounter Details IS_REIMB_IMPACT

This is a Binary flag to indicate and identify "Reconciled- Impact" encounters.

Example: Displays 1 for Reconciled-Impact encounters.
Encounter Details IS_RETROSPECTIVE_REVIEW

This is a Binary flag to indicate if an encounter has a retrospective review.

Example: Displays 1 for Retrospective Reviews.

Encounter Details Last Imported Date and Time

Displays the time for which the Final Coded Summary was last imported .

Example: 6/29/2021
Encounter Details Last Imported Date and Time Display

Displays the time and date for which the Final Coded Summary was last imported .

Example: 6/29/2021 08:00:00 PM ET
Encounter Details Last Review Date and Time

Displays the list of dates when Last Review was done.

Example: 3/26/2020
Encounter Details Last Review Date and Time Local

Displays the list of dates in local timezone when Last Review was done.

Example: 3/26/2020
Encounter Details Last Review Date and Time On Change

Displays the date of the last time the user saved when a change was made to the encounter.

Example: 7/29/2020
Encounter Details Last Review Date and Time On Change Display

Displays the date and time of the last time the user saved when a change was made to the encounter.

Example: 01/07/2020 02:22:44 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Encounter Details Last Review Date and Time On Change Local

Displays the local date of the last time the user saved when a change was made to the encounter.

Example: 7/29/2020
Encounter Details LOS

Displays the total Length of Stay (LOS) in days.

Example: 5
Encounter Details MATCH

This is a flag to indicate if the encounter is a Matched Encounter, i.e. Final Coded DRG matches with Possible DRG (Working DRG if Possible DRG is Blank).

Example: Displays Y for Matched Encounters
Encounter Details Medical CMI After CDI

Displays the average of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

Medical CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact. / Total count of medical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). This value is represented with 4 decimals. Example: 4.5874

Note:
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Encounter Details Medical CMI Before CDI

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Medical CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Medical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0) / Total count of Medical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
Note:
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical). Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation. This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Medical CMI Before CDI
Note:
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation. This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Medical CMI Shift

Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)..

Medical CMI Shift(%) = (Medical CMI After CDI- Medical CMI Before CDI.

Example: 1.1396

Note:
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Medical CMI Shift (%)

Displays the percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Medical CMI Shift(%) = (Medical CMI After CDI- Medical CMI Before CDI /Medical Before CDI) *100

Example: 33%

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Encounter Details Medical Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for medical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).

Medical Reimbursement Impact ($) = Medical CMI Shift * Blended Rate

Example: 1547

Note:
Medical Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Encounter Details Missed Concurrent Reviews Displays the count of reviewed encounters for each standard or custom rank category. Reviewed encounters that do not have a rank assigned are grouped under the 'Unranked' category
Note:
When you choose the 'View By' option as CDS, you are looking specifically at the initial review conducted by CDS. This count includes all ranked encounters that had an initial review date/time. However, encounters that were initially reviewed but later marked as "Review Not Needed" are excluded from this calculation.
Encounter Details Missed Top Rank Reviews (Rank 1,2 and 6)

Displays the count of encounters with the highest rank as 1, 2, or 6 that were not reviewed by the CDS. These encounters do not have an initial review date/time. The encounters may or may not have a Discharge Date/time assigned.

Missed Top Rank Reviews = Count of top ranked encounters (Rank 1, 2 and 6) with no initial review, i.e. Initial Review Date/Time is blank.

Only top ranked (Standard Highest Rank 1, 2 and 6) encounters are considered.
Encounter Details

No Response Potential CMI Shift

Displays the Potential CMI shift and percentage for the financial impact clarifications that were not responded by the providers for the selected time period.

Potential CMI Shift = Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari - Potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clari.
Encounter Details

No Response Potential CMI Shift (%)

Displays the Potential CMI shift and percentage for the financial impact clarifications that were not responded by the providers for the selected time period.

Potential CMI Shift % = (Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari - Potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clari) / Potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clari x 100.
Encounter Details

No Response Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the ‘No Response Reimbursement Impact’ value for the encounter.

'Reimbursement Impact' for an encounter is calculated using the below formula:

  • Encounter No Response Reimbursement Impact = (Encounter No Response Variance x Blended Rate).

  • Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. $ 5,234.
Encounter Details

No Response Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the ‘No Response Reimbursement Impact’ value for the encounter.

'Reimbursement Impact' for an encounter is calculated using the below formula:

  • Encounter No Response Reimbursement Impact = (Encounter No Response Variance x Blended Rate).

  • Rounded to 0 decimal places. E.g. $ 5,234.
Encounter Details

Overall No Response Reimbursement Impact ($)

 Displays the overall potential dollar amount associated with the financial impact clarifications that the providers did not respond for the selected time period. Overall No Response Impact = $(No response Potential CMI Shift * Blended Rate).

Format: $4512.
Encounter Details Missed Reviews %

Displays out of total discharged encounters, the percentage of encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge.

Missed Review % = (Discharged encounters with no initial review or initial review after discharge / Discharged encounters) X 100

Example: 7%
Encounter Details MISSED_REVIEWS

This is a flag to identify and indicate no initial review is done.

Example: Displays 1 for no initial review done.

Encounter Details Mortality Worklist Flag
Displays the list of encounters that are presented to Mortality Worklist..
  • Y = Encounters that are presented to Mortality Worklist.
  • N = Encounters that are not presented to Mortality Worklist.

Example: N, Y
Encounter Details MRN

Displays the list of Medical Record Number (MRN) of the patients.

Example: 12345
Encounter Details No Further Action Required

This is a flag to indicate and identify ‘No Further Action Required’ checkbox on the Post-Discharge Review Checklist screen.

Example: Displays Y if Post-Discharge Reviewer selects ‘No Further Action Required’ check box on the Post-Discharge Review Checklist screen.
Encounter Details NO_RESPONSE_IMPACT_REIMBURSEMNT

Displays Reimbursement Value of the encounter in dollars.

Reimbursement ($) = (Possible DRG WT-Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT) X Blended_Rate

Note:
Operating Federal Rate is used if Blended Rate is 0.
Encounter Details NO_RESPONSE_IMPACT_VARIANCE

Displays the Variance of the encounter.

Variance = (Possible DRG WT - Reconciliation Assessment WT)
Encounter Details Number of Cases with Financial Impact
Number of Cases with Financial Impact = The total count of Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters with F-DRG WT > R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT > 0) and F-DRG WT < R-DRG WT (Or F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT < 0).
Note:
Note: Reconciled-Impact (Impact Type: Financial, Both, Unassigned Impact for Discharge Date < 11/14/2019) encounters without a shift in the WT (F-DRG WT – R-DRG WT = 0 or F-DRG = R-DRG WT) are not considered in the numerator.
Encounter Details OPERATING_FEDERAL_RATE

Displays the Operating Federal rate for a single encounter.

Example: 1700
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications Agreed Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of sent clarifications with Final response as Agreed.

Overall Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Agreed/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 58 (95%)

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Alternative Diagnosis.

Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Alternative Diagnosis/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 14 (45%)

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications No Response Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as No Response.

Overall Clarifications No Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications with No Response/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 4 (2%)

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications Not Agreed Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Not Agreed.

Overall Clarifications Not Agreed Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Not Agreed / Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 10 (9%)

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Other Explanation.

Overall Clarifications Other Explanation Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Other Explanation/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 11 (17%)

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications Responded Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of sent clarifications with Final response other than Pending, Retracted, or No Response.

Overall Response Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Responded/ Overall Clarifications Sent) x 100)

Example: 78 (65%)

Note:

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

"Removed" and "Retracted" Clarifications are not considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarifications with Final response as Unable to Determine.

Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine Rate = ((Overall Clarifications Unable to Determine/ Overall Clarifications Responded) x 100)

Example: 18 (12%)

Note:
Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications that do not have a FINAL response are not considered in this calculation.
Encounter Details Overall CMI After CDI

Displays the average of Final DRG WTs of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

CMI After CDI = The sum of Final Coded DRG WTs of all Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled- No Impact, and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both, Financial, (Unassigned (DD< 11/14/2019)) encounters that meet the report criteria / Total count of reconciled cases (Auto-Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled-No Impact) for the selected report criteria. (Rounded 4 decimal places E.g. 2.1868).

Example: 4.1147

Note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Overall CMI Before CDI

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact

Overall CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)

Note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals.

Example: 2.9745
Encounter Details Overall CMI Shift

Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)).

Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI.

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Overall CMI Shift (%)

Percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100

Example: 38%

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Overall DRG WT Before CDI

Displays the Overall DRG WT Before CDI

Example: 1.4587

DRG WT Before CDI = Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (Working DRG WT is used if Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT is null or Discharge Date is before 11/14/2019)
Encounter Details Overall Encounters with Impact Opportunity Post-Discharge

Displays the count of encounters with Post Discharge Opportunity.

Example: 34
Encounter Details Overall Instances Agreed Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is Agreed.

Overall Instance Agreed Rate = Instances with response as Agreed / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 25 (12%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Instances Alternative Diagnosis Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Alternative Diagnosis".

Overall Instances Alternative Diagnosis Rate = Instances with Response as "Alternative Diagnosis" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 5 (4%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Instances No Response Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "No Response".

Overall Instances No Response Rate = Instances with Response as "No Response" / The count of clarification instances sent with Response other than Retracted ) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 19 (23%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Instances Not Agreed Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Not Agreed".

Overall Instances Not Agreed Rate = Instances with Response as "Not Agreed" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 14 (12%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Instances Other Explanation Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Other Explanation".

Overall Instances Other Explanation Rate = Instances with Response as "Other Explanation" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 33 (47%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Instances Responded Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response.

Overall Instances Response Rate = The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response /The count of sent clarification instances with Response other than Retracted.) x 100

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Example: 12 (4%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Instances Unable to Determine Count and Rate

Displays the count and percentage of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is "Unable to Determine".

Overall Instances Unable to Determine Rate = Instances with Response as "Unable to Determine" / The count of clarification instances for which the Instance Response is other than Pending, Retracted or No Response) x 100

(Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: 5 (10%)

Note:

Instances for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Instances for Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Overall Positive CMI Shift

Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Overall CMI Shift= (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI)

Example: 1.885

Note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Overall Positive CMI Shift (%)

Displays the percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0)).

Overall CMI Shift(%) = (Overall CMI After CDI- Overall CMI Before CDI /Overall Before CDI) *100

Example: 51%

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Overall Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Impact Encounters.

Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) = Overall CMI Shift * Blended Rate

Example: 45127

Note:
Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge

Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Billed DRG and Final Coded DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) in which Final Billed WT >= Final Coded WT (Final Billed WT - Final Coded WT >= 0).

Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge = (The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) with positive Overall WT Shift) * Blended Rate

Example: 1299

Note:
Total Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge rounded to 0 decimal places.

Encounters with negative WT shift i.e. (Final Billed WT - Final Coded WT < 0) are not considered in this metric calculation.

The value must be displayed in $.
Encounter Details Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge including negative

Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Billed DRG and Final Coded DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).

Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge = (The sum of Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact)) * Blended Rate

Example: 2047

Note:
Total 'Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge including negative' rounded to 0 decimal places.

The 'Overall Reimbursement Impact Post-Discharge including negative' can be positive or negative.

The value must be displayed in $.
Encounter Details P_DRG_AMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay (AMLOS) from Possible Review panel.

Example: 3.4569

Note:
Advanced AMLOS is used if Primary AMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details P_DRG_GMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Geometric Mean Length of Stay (GMLOS) from Possible Review panel.

Example: 2.7789

Note:
Advanced GMLOS is used if Primary GMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details P_DRG_MDC_Derived

Displays the list of Major Diagnostic Category (MDC) from Possible Review panel.

Example: 01, 09, 15, 25 etc.

Note:
Advanced MDC is used if Primary MDC is blank.
Encounter Details P_DRG_ROM_Derived

Displays the total Rate of Mortality (ROM) from Possible Review panel.

Example: 146

Note:
Advanced ROM is used if Primary ROM is blank.
Encounter Details P_DRG_SOI_Derived

Displays the total Severity of Illness (SOI) from Possible Review panel.

Example: 154

Note:
Advanced SOi is used if Primary SOI is blank.
Encounter Details Patient Name

Displays the name of the patient.

Example: Last Name, First Name
Encounter Details Patient Type

Displays the type of the patient.

Example: Inpatient
Encounter Details Payer Description

Displays the list of available Payers with their ID and description.

Example: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Encounter Details Payer ID

Displays the list of Payer ID's

Example: Payer ID
Encounter Details PD Reviewed

This is a flag that identify and indicate if Post-Discharge Review is performed.

Example: Y is displayed if Post Discharge Review is done.
Encounter Details PD_IS_IMPACT

This is a boolean flag that identify and indicate if encounter has a Post-Discharge Impact.

Example: Displays True for encounters with Post-Discharge encounters with Impact
Encounter Details PD_OPP

This is a boolean flag that identify and indicate if Post-Discharge encounters has an Opportunity identified.

Example: Displays True for Post-Discharge encounters with Opportunities Identified.
Encounter Details PD_REV

This is a flag to identify and indicate if Post Discharge Review was performed.

Example: True, False
Encounter Details Pediatric

This is flag that identify and indicate if the encounter is Pediatric.

Example: Displays Y for pediatric encounters.
Encounter Details PM Before WT Do not use.
Encounter Details PM Variance Do not use.
Encounter Details Possible DRG

Displays the list of Possible DRG codes and descriptions

Example: 977 - HIV W OR W/O OTHER RELATED CONDITION
Encounter Details Possible DRG Actual

Displays the list of Possible DRG codes and descriptions.

Example: 871 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITH MCC

Note:
In case of Blank Possible DRG, Working DRG code and description is displayed.
Encounter Details Possible DRG WT

Displays the weight value of Possible DRG codes

Example: 120.44
Encounter Details Possible PDX

Displays the list of Primary Diagnosis CM Code from Possible DRG Panel.

Example: A209, H44022 etc.
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_AMLOS

Displays the total AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) from the Possible DRG Review panel.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_AMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the total AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Possible DRG Review panel.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_CODE

Displays the DRG Code from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 777
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_CODE_ACTUAL

Displays the actual Possible DRG code from the application DB.

Example: 777

Note:
Displays blank if field from application db is blank.
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_CODE_ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 147
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_DESCRIPTION

Displays the DRG Code description from the Possible Review panel.

Example: Fever & inflammatory conditions
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_DESCRIPTION_ACTUAL

Displays the actual Possible DRG description from the application DB.

Example: Degenerative nervous system disorders except multiple sclerosis

Note:
Displays blank if field from application db is blank.
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_DESCRIPTION_ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code description using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: FEVER AND INFLAMMATORY CONDITIONS
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_GMLOS

Displays the total GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_GMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the total GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_MDC

Displays the MDC value from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 18
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_MDC_ADVANCED

Displays the MDC value using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 25
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_REMB

Displays the total Reimbursement value (in $) from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 26.42
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_REMB_ADVANCED

Displays the total Reimbursement value (in $) using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 141.2
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_ROM

Displays list of Risk of Mortality (ROM) from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 2
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_ROM_ADVANCED

Displays list of Risk of Mortality (ROM) using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 3
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_SOI

Displays list of Severity of Illness (SOI) from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 1
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_SOI_ADVANCED

Displays list of Severity of Illness (SOI) using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 4
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_WT

Displays the total relative weight value from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 1.1478
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_WT_ACTUAL

Displays the actual total Possible DRG relative weight value from application DB.

Example: 1.1478

Note:
Displays blank if field from application db is blank.
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_DRG_WT_ADVANCED

Displays the total relative weight value using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: 4.587
Encounter Details POSSIBLE_MEDICAL_SURGICAL

Displays list of DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) from the Possible Review panel.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details POSSIBLE_MEDICAL_SURGICAL_ADVANCED

Displays list of DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) using Advanced grouper from the Possible Review panel.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details Post-Discharge Assignment Date and Time

Displays the date when Post-Discharge encounter was assigned to a Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: 2/27/2020
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Assignment Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when Post-Discharge encounter was assigned to a Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: 01/27/2021 07:53:44 AM ET

Note:
Facility timezone is considered.
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Encounters Impacted

Displays the count of reviewed encounters for which the post-discharge review resulted in a higher reimbursement.

Example: 20
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Encounters Impacted Rate

Displays out of total encounters with impact opportunities, percentage of Post-Discharge Encounters Impacted.

Post-Discharge Encounters Impacted Rate = (Post-Discharge Encounters Impacted/ Encounters with Impact Opportunity) x 100)

Example: 45%
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Encounters Reviewed

Displays the total count of encounters reviewed by the post-discharge case reviewer.

Example: 39
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Encounters Reviewed Rate

Displays out of total encounters with impact opportunities, percentage of encounters reviewed by the post-discharge case reviewer

Post-Discharge Encounters Reviewed Rate = (Encounters Reviewed by the post-discharge case reviewer/ Encounters with Impact Opportunity) x 100)

Example: 71%
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Encounters with Impact Opportunity

Displays the count of encounters with at-least one post-discharge review opportunity identified.

Example: 88
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Review Reimbursement Impact

Displays the total 'Post-Discharge Review Reimbursement Impact ’ value in dollars.

Reimbursement Impact = Variance x Blended Rate (Rounded to 0 decimal places)

Example: $3,889

Note:
Negative ‘Reimbursement Impact’ is displayed in the red font.

Example: . -$ 5,234
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Reviewed Date and Time

Displays the date when Post-Discharge Review is performed.

Example: 1/28/2021
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Reviewed Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when Post-Discharge Review is performed.

Example: 01/28/2021 09:00:08 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Encounter Details Post-Discharge Variance

Displays the total Post-Discharge Variance value .

Variance = (Final Billed DRG WT - Final Coded DRG WT)

Example: 5.4478

Note:
Rounded to 4 decimal points.

Negative ‘Variance’ is displayed in red font.
Encounter Details Potential CMI with No Response Impact

Displays the potential CMI No Response Impact Clarification.

Note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals. Format

: 1.9985.

Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari = The sum of Reconciliation Assessment Coded DRG WTs of all Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and no other Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and the sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (from backend grouping) of all the Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and with at least one Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) / Total count of Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both , Financial) encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) with Final response as No Response.
Encounter Details

Potential CMI without No Response Impact
Displays the potential CMI w/o No Response Impact Clarification.
Note:
This value is represented with 4 decimals. Format

: 1.9985.

Potential CMI with No Response Impact Clari = The sum of Reconciliation Assessment Coded DRG WTs of all Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and no other Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and the sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (from backend grouping) of all the Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: Both, Financial) encounters with at least one No Response Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) and with at least one Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) / Total count of Reconciled- No Impact (Impact Type: No Impact), and Reconciled Impact (Impact Type: SOI/ROM Impact, Both , Financial) encounters with at least one Financial Impact Clarification (Standard or custom) with Final response as No Response.
Encounter Details Potential Reimbursement Type Slicer

This is a flag to identify and indicate the Potential reimbursement impact.

Example: Negative Impact, No Impact, Positive Impact
Encounter Details POTENTIAL_REIMBURSEMNT_PBIX Do not use.
Encounter Details Pre-Discharge Worklist

This is a flag to identify and indicate encounters from Pre-Discharge worklist.

Example: Displays N for encounters that do not fall under Pre-Discharge worklist.
Encounter Details Provider

Displays the list of Provider ID's

Example: PROVID1, PROVID2, etc.
Encounter Details Quality Alert Resolution Rate

Displays out of total quality clarifications (Type at Recon as PSI, PDI, NQI)generated, the count of quality clarifications resolved.

Example:

Note:
Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Clarifications Agreed

Displays out of total quality clarifications (Type at Recon as PSI, PDI, NQI)responded, the count of quality clarifications agreed by the providers.

Example: 28

Note:
Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Clarifications Agreed Rate

Displays out of total quality clarifications responded, the percentage of quality clarifications agreed by the providers.

Quality Clarifications Agreed Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Agreed/Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded)*100

Example: 89%

Note:
Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded

Displays out of total quality clarifications sent, the count of quality clarifications responded by the providers.

Example: 35

Note:

Active Alerts will not be considered. Only clarifications with a Final response will be counted.

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

Encounter Details Quality Alerts Clarifications Response Rate

Displays out of total quality clarifications sent, the % of quality clarifications responded by the providers.

Quality Clarifications Response Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded/Quality Alerts Clarifications Sent)*100

Example: 77%

Note:
Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Clarifications Sent

Displays out of the total quality alerts generated, the count of resolved alerts for which quality clarifications were sent by the CDS.

Example: 45

Note:

CDS can send the clarifications to resolve the alerts in 2 ways:

A. Selecting the "Create new clarification on Code" option from the Add to drop down option in the "Specific Exclusions" pop up.

B. Selecting the "New Clarification" link directly from the Quality Alerts panel.

Only one clarification can be sent for each quality alert.

This will not include the count of alerts that are active.

Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Generated

Displays the count of the total Quality Alerts generated.

Example: 55

Note:

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Resolved

Displays the count of the total Quality Alerts generated.

Example: 45

Note:

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts Unaddressed

Displays the count of the total active Quality Alerts .

Example: 10

Note:

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts with No Exclusion

Displays out of the total quality alerts generated, the count of resolved alerts for which CDS selects "No Exclusion - NQI Present"/ "No Exclusion - PDI Present"/ "No Exclusion - PSI Present" option from the Global Exclusion pop up based on the alert category to resolve the alert.

Example: 5

Note:

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts with Other Global Exclusion

Displays out of the total alerts generated, the count of resolved alerts with for which CDS selects a ‘Global Exclusion’ (other than POA and No Exclusion(Present) ) criteria.

Example: 8

Note:

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts with POA

Displays out of the total quality alerts generated, the count of resolved alerts for which CDS selects "Present on Admission" option.

Example: 12

Note:

POA option can be used to resolve the alert can be used in 2 ways:

Adding the POA directly in the Review grid.

Selecting "Present on Admission" option from the Global Exclusion pop up.

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details R-DRG (For No Response) R-DRG (For No Response): Displays the regrouped Reconciliation DRG (from backend grouping) along with the description in red font. R-DRG WT (For No Response): Displays the regrouped Reconciliation DRG WT (from backend grouping) along with the description in red font.
Note:
This is displayed in Red font, only for cases with Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as No Response and other Financial Impact Clarifications with Final Response as Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation are present; For other scenarios, display the R-DRG/R-DRG WT details.
Encounter Details R-DRG WT (For No Response)

Displays the WT associated with the regrouped (from backend grouping) Reconciliation Assessment DRG. Example: 1.0393.

Note:
This is displayed in Red font, only for cases with Financial Impact Clarifications with Final response as No Response and other Financial Impact Clarifications present with Final response as Agreed/Alt DX/Other Explanation. For other scenarios, display the R-DRG WT.
Encounter Details Quality Alerts with Specific Exclusion

Displays out of the total alerts generated, the count of resolved alerts with ‘Specific Exclusion’ criteria set by the CDS.

Example: 8

Note:
Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details R_DRG_AMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay (AMLOS) from Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 3.4569

Note:
Advanced AMLOS is used if Primary AMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details R_DRG_GMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Geometric Mean Length of Stay (GMLOS) from Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 2.7789

Note:
Advanced GMLOS is used if Primary GMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details R_DRG_MDC_Derived

Displays the list of Major Diagnostic Category (MDC) from Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 01, 09, 15, 25 etc.

Note:
Advanced MDC is used if Primary MDC is blank.
Encounter Details R_DRG_ROM_Derived

Displays the total Rate of Mortality (ROM) from Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 146

Note:
Advanced ROM is used if Primary ROM is blank.
Encounter Details R_DRG_SOI_Derived

Displays the total Severity of Illness (SOI) from Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 154

Note:
Advanced SOi is used if Primary SOI is blank.
Encounter Details Rank at Discharge

Displays the available list of 'Rank at Discharge'

Example: Rank 1, Rank 2 etc.
Encounter Details Rank_at_Discharge

Displays the total value of 'Rank at Discharge' for all the encounters.

Example: 21
Encounter Details Rank_at_Discharge_Sort_Order Do not use.
Encounter Details RANK_CURRENT

Displays the total value of the current rank assigned to the encounters.

Example: 50
Encounter Details Ranked Encounters Reviewed

Displays the count and percentage of ranked encounters reviewed for the selected time period.
Encounter Details RANK_REVIEW

Displays the rank of encounter at the time of review.

Example: N, Y
Encounter Details Readmission Flag
Displays whether an patient is readmitted.
  • Readmission flag is Y, when the patient is readmitted.
  • Readmission flag is N, when the patient is not readmitted.

Example: N, Y
Encounter Details Ready To Reconcile Date Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'Ready to Reconcile'.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details Ready To Reconcile Date and Time Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'Ready to Reconcile'.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details Ready To Reconcile Date and Time Display Displays the date and time when encounter status is set as 'Ready to Reconcile'.

Example: 03/05/2024 06:40:11 AM ET.

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Reconciliation Date Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'Reconcile Impact' or 'Reconciled No Impact'.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details Reconciliation Date and Time Displays the date when encounter status is set as 'Reconcile Impact' or 'Reconciled No Impact'.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details Reconciliation Date and Time Display Displays the date and time when encounter status is set as 'Reconcile Impact' or 'Reconciled No Impact'.

Example: 03/05/2024 06:40:11 AM ET.

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details Recommendation For

Displays the list of all Recommendations made by the reviewer in a comma-separated format.

Example: Resequencing PDx, Resolved Clarification, Reimbursable Secondary Diagnosis.

Encounter Details Reconciled Encounters Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details Reconciled Medical Cases

Displays the total number of medical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

Example: 25

Note:
Medical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Medical (M) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Medical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than M are not considered in this metric calculation.

Encounter Details Reconciled Surgical Cases

Displays the total number of surgical encounters with status as Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact.

Example: 34

Note:
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Encounter Details Reconciliation Assessment PDX

Displays the list of Primary Diagnosis CM Code from the Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: A021, J691, N10 etc.
Encounter Details Reconciliation Assessment Reimbursement Displays the $ value from the Reconciliation Assessment section in the application.

Example: $17,000.00.
Encounter Details Reconciliation Review Date

Displays date and time when first Reconciliation review was performed by the CDS for the patient.

Example: 8/7/2020
Encounter Details Reconciliation Review Date and Time

Displays date and time when first Reconciliation review was performed by the CDS for the patient.

Example: 4/1/2020
Encounter Details Reimbursement Impact Do not use.
Encounter Details Reimbursement Impact Agreed Do not use.
Encounter Details Reimbursement Impact Clarification Rate_Blank Handeled Do not use.
Encounter Details Reimbursement Impact_Weight “Reimbursement Impact_Weights” value should be displayed in $. The value should be rounded off to 0 decimal places making it consistent with other reimbursement values.
Encounter Details Reimbursement without Impact Agreed Do not use.
Encounter Details ReimbursementImpact_BlankHandled Do not use.
Encounter Details Review Complete Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details Review is Missed and Discharge

This is a flag to identify and indicate if review is missed and patient is discharged.

Example: Displays 'Done' if review is missed and discharged.
Encounter Details Review Rate

Displays out of total encounters (Admissions/Discharges), the percentage of encounters reviewed.

Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Admissions/Discharges) x 100. (Rounded to 0 decimal places.)

Example: 89%

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Encounter Details Review Rate % Do not use.
Encounter Details Review Rate2 Do not use.
Encounter Details Reviewed Enc with Clar Sent Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details Reviewed Encounters with Code Suggestions Displays the count of encounters with an initial review date/time that had at least one AI suggestion in CDS Assistant.
Encounter Details Reviews

Displays the total count of reviews performed.

Example: 45
Encounter Details ROM After CDI

Displays the list of Rate of Mortality (ROM) values in Final Coded Summary Section.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

Note:
Advanced ROM Values are used if Primary ROM values are blank.
Encounter Details ROM Before CDI

Displays the list of Rate of Mortality (ROM) values in Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

Note:
Advanced ROM Values are used if Primary ROM values are blank.
Encounter Details Room

Displays the list of available patient's room numer.

Example: 101, 102, etc
Encounter Details SEV Impact Clarification Rate

Displays out of total encounters reviewed, the percentage of Encounters with SEV Impact Clarifications.

SEV Impact Clarification Rate = (Count of reviewed encounters with at least one SEV Impact clarification with the status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED / Count of encounters with an initial review date) X 100

Example: 41%

Note:

Clarification with a standard or custom ‘Primary Type at Reconciliation’ defined as SEV is a SEV Impact Clarification.

Clarifications with Status 'REMOVED' or 'RETRACTED' are excluded from the count.

Clarifications for "Review Not Needed" encounter status should not be considered for this metric calculation.
Encounter Details SOI After CDI

Displays the list of Severity of Illness (SOI) values in Final Coded Summary Section.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

Note:
Advanced SOI Values are used if Primary SOI values are blank.
Encounter Details SOI Before CDI

Displays the list of Severity of Illness (SOI) values in Reconciliation Assessment section.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4 etc.

Note:
Advanced SOI Values are used if Primary SOI values are blank.
Encounter Details Specialty

Displays the list of Speciality ID's as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.

Example: CARD, ORTHO etc.
Encounter Details Specialty Description

Displays the list of Specialty descriptions as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.

Example: Cardiologist, Orthopaedic etc.
Encounter Details Suggestions Clarified

Displays the count of suggested codes for which CDS generated a clarification.
Encounter Details SUFFIX

Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.

Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.
Encounter Details Surgical CMI After CDI

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Surgical CMI After CDI = Sum of Final DRG WTs of all surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). / Total count of surgical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact). This value is represented with 4 decimals. Example: 5.4789

Note:
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Encounter Details Surgical CMI Before CDI

Displays the average of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0). .

Surgical CMI Before CDI = Sum of Reconciliation Assessment DRG WTs (or Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank) of all Surgical encounters with status of Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0) / Total count of Surgical Reconciled Encounters. (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).

This value is represented with 4 decimals. Example: : 3.3694.

Note:
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Medical. ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

Encounter Details Surgical CMI Shift

Displays the shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Surgical CMI Shift(%) = (Surgical CMI After CDI- Surgical CMI Before CDI.

Example: 2.1095

Note:
Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

This value is represented with 4 decimals.
Encounter Details Surgical CMI Shift (%)

Displays the percentage shift in weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) for which Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or W-DRG WT) is less than or equal to Final DRG WT (Final WT- R-DRG WT >= 0).

Surgical CMI Shift(%) = (Surgical CMI After CDI- Surgical CMI Before CDI /Surgical Before CDI) *100

Example: 63%

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG (or Assessment or Working DRG) is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Encounter Details Surgical Reimbursement Impact ($)

The total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for surgical Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).

Surgical Reimbursement Impact ($) = Surgical CMI Shift * Blended Rate

Example: $1367

Note:
Surgical Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

Rounded to 0 decimal places.

Surgical encounters are those for which Final Coded DRG is Surgical (S) ( if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Final DRG Code = Assessment DRG Code, then Assessment DRG is Surgical. OR if M/S indicator is not available for Final DRG and Assessment DRG, and Final DRG Code = Working DRG Code, then Working DRG is Surgical)

Encounters for which M/S Indicator for Final Coded DRG is other than S are not considered in this metric calculation.

This value is represented with 0 decimals.
Encounter Details Target Diagnosis

Display if the encounter has a Target Diagnosis available.

Display Y if available, or Blank.
Note:

The Diagnosis codes displayed with a star (*) on the Triage Worklist indicates that the primary code is a target diagnosis code.

This code can either be CLU suggested or manually added.
Encounter Details Total Admissions

Displays the total count of encounters that have an Admit Date/time.

Example: 89

Note:
All encounter statuses are considered in this metric (Review Not Needed, Untouched, Discharged, etc.)
Encounter Details Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact($)

Displays the total potential reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Working DRG and Possible DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and status of In Progress,Discharged, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

If Possible DRG Weight is blank, Working DRG Weight is considered: This is applicable only for this metric calculation.

Example: $4933

Note:
Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact ($) = Concurrent CMI Shift * Blended Rate
Note:
Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) can be either positive or negative.

Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact ($) at 75%

Displays the total potential reimbursement at 75% resulting from shift in the weight between Working DRG and Possible DRG weights for Encounters that have an initial review date and status of In Progress,Discharged, Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete and Reconciliation Hold.

Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact ($) at 75% = (Total Concurrent Reimbursement Impact($) )*0.75

Example: $3117

Note:
Negative ‘Total Potential Reimbursement($)’ is displayed in the red font.
Encounter Details Total Count of Assigned Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters which have a CDS assigned.

Example: 55

Note:

CDS is not "Unassigned CDS" or "Blank"

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Encounter Details Total Count of Auto-Reconciled Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Auto-Reconciled.

Example: 11
Encounter Details Total Count of Concurrent Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Initial Review Date/Time and status as In Progress, Review Complete, Ready to Reconcile and Reconciliation-Hold status.

Example: 29
Encounter Details Total Count of Discharged Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Discharged.

Example: 25
Encounter Details Total Count of In Progress Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as In Progress.

Example: 8
Encounter Details Total Count of Non-Reconciled Encounters

Displays the count of encounters with Ready to Reconcile, Review Complete, Reconciliation-Hold status.

Example: 4
Encounter Details Total Count of Ready to Reconcile Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Ready to Reconcile.

Example: 13
Encounter Details Total count of reconciled cases with Both Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Both Impact.

Example: 12
Encounter Details Total count of reconciled cases with Financial Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as Financial Impact.

Example: 8
Encounter Details Total count of reconciled cases with No Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as 'No Impact'.

Example: 2
Encounter Details Total count of reconciled cases with SOI/ROM Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Impact Type as SOI/ROM Impact.

Example: 5
Encounter Details Total count of reconciled cases with Unassigned Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Blank Impact Type

Example: 1
Encounter Details Total Count of Reconciled Encounters

Displays the count of encounters with Reconciled Impact, Reconciled No Impact, or Auto Reconcile status.

Example: 11
Encounter Details Total Count of Reconciliation Hold Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Reconciliation-Hold.

Example: 36
Encounter Details Total Count of Reimbursement Impact Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Reconciled- Impact.

Example: 3
Encounter Details Total Count of Reimbursement No-Impact Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Reconciled- No Impact.

Example: 19
Encounter Details Total Count of Review Complete Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Review Complete.

Example: 25
Encounter Details Total Count of Review Not Needed Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Review Not Needed.

Example: 2
Encounter Details Total Count of Unassigned Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.

Example: 20

Note:

CDS is "Unassigned CDS" or "Blank"

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Encounter Details Total Count of Unassigned Encounters Not Reviewed

Displays the total count of 'Untouched' and 'Discharged' encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.

Example: 29

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Encounter Details Total Count of Untouched Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with Status as Untouched

Example: 14
Encounter Details Total Discharges

Displays the total count of encounters that have an Discharge Date/time.

Example: 36

Note:
All encounter statuses are considered.
Encounter Details Total Encounters

Displays the total count of encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.

Example: 72

Note:

When the Discharge Date is applied, then this displays the count of discharged encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.

When the Admit Date is applied, then this displays the count of admitted encounters with status other than Review Not Needed.
Encounter Details Total Missed Reimbursement ($)

Displays the sum of total missed reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Coded DRG and Reconciliation Assessment DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) that have at-least one impact clarifications with Final Response as 'No Response'

Example: $4,777

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Total Negative Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the sum of Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact) with negative Overall CMI Shift.

Negative Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for an encounter = (Overall CMI Shift < 0) * Blended Rate

Total Negative Reimbursement Impact ($) = Sum of Negative Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for all Reconciled Encounters

Example: -$1472

Note:
