Total Negative Reimbursement Impact ($) rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Total No Response Reimbursement Impact ($) Displays the total reimbursement impact for all the no response financial impact clariifcations.
Encounter Details Total Positive Reimbursement by Init Reviews This is the total positive reimbursement impact calculated against the count of initial reviews performed. This is a custom field created and is a dollar amount and will be rounded off to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Total Positive Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the sum of Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Impact Encounters with positive Overall CMI Shift.

Positive Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for a reconciled encounter = (Overall CMI Shift >= 0) * Blended Rate

Total Positive Reimbursement Impact ($) = Sum of Positive Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) for all Reconciled Encounters.

Example: $25,877

Note:
Total Positive Reimbursement Impact ($) rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Total Reimbursement Impact ($)

Displays the sum of Overall Reimbursement Impact ($) of all Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).

Example: $7,896

Note:
Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Encounter Details Tracking Codes

Displays the list of available Tracking codes.

Example: Tracking Code1, Tracking Code2 etc.

Note:
Multiple Tracking Codes will be displayed comma separated.
Encounter Details Un Assigned Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details Un Assigned Discharge

Displays the total count of 'Discharged' encounters that do not have a CDS assigned.

Example: 61

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Encounter Details Unranked Encounters Count of encounters that were not ranked out of the total discharges for the selected "View By" option. Encounters are ranked based only on the rules that are defined for the prioritization within CDE Triage. Any encounter that does not meet the criteria is defined as an unranked encounter.
Encounter Details Unranked Encounters Reviewed The count of unranked encounters reviewed with or without clarifications.

% Unranked Encounters Reviewed = Unranked Encounters Reviewed / Encounters Ranked x 100. This value is rounded to 0 decimal places. For example, 30%.
Encounter Details Unit

Displays the list of available Units.

Example: CARD, IMED etc
Encounter Details VARIANCE_PBIX Do not use.
Encounter Details Visit Type

Displays the list of available Visit Types.

Example: Visit Type ID
Encounter Details Visit Type Modification Date Displays the date when visit type is modified resulting in patient type change.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details Visit Type Modification Date and Time Displays the date when visit type is modified resulting in patient type change.

Example: 2/15/2024.
Encounter Details Visit Type Modification Date and Time Display Displays the date and time when visit type is modified resulting in patient type change.

Example: 03/05/2024 06:40:11 AM ET.

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Encounter Details W MS-DRG

Displays the Working MS-DRG along with the description displayed on the Review page.

Example: 872 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITHOUT MAJOR COMPLICATION OR COMORBIDITY (MCC).
Encounter Details W MS-DRG WT

Displays the WT associated with the Working MS DRG displayed on the Review page.

Example: 1.0393.
Encounter Details MS-DRG Encounter Variance

Displays the shift in the WT at the encounter level.

Example: 1.0178.

Encounter Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Reconciliation Assessment DRG WT (or Variance = Final Coded DRG WT - Working DRG WT when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank).

Note:

Encounter Variance can be negative, positive, or zero.

Negative variance is displayed in the red font.

Encounter Variance is not calculated for the encounters that do not have an initial review date.

Review Not Needed encounters are not considered for this metric caalculation.

Rounded to 4 decimal places. E.g. 2.1868.
Encounter Details MS-DRG Encounter Reimbursement Impact ($)

The ‘Reimbursement Impact’ value for the encounter.

Example: $ 5,234.

  • Encounter Reimbursement Impact = Encounter Variance x Blended Rate.
  • Rounded to 0 decimal places.
  • Negative ‘Reimbursement Impact ($)’ is displayed in the red font.
Encounter Details Overall MS-DRG Reimbursement Impact ($) Displays the total expected reimbursement resulting from shift in the weight between Final Billed DRG and Final Coded DRG weights for Reconciled Encounters (Auto- Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact or Reconciled-No Impact).
Encounter Details W MS-DRG AMLOS

Displays the 'AMLOS' value from the working review.

Example: 3.1.
Encounter Details W-MS-DRG GMLOS

Displays the 'GMLOS ' value from the working review.

Example: 3.2.

Note:
If the GMLOS associated with the primary working DRG is not available, then the GMLOS associated with the advanced working DRG is displayed.
Encounter Details W MS-DRG Type

Displays the Working MS DRG type displayed on the Review page.
Encounter Details P MS-DRG

Displays the' Possible MS-DRG along with the description displayed on the Review page. Example: 872 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITHOUT MAJOR COMPLICATION OR COMORBIDITY (MCC).

Note:
This column displays the ‘Working MS DRG’ value in the orange font for the encounters for which ‘Possible MS DRG’ is blank or null.
Encounter Details P MS-DRG WT

Displays the WT associated with the Possible MS-DRG displayed on the Review page. Example: 1.0393.

Note:
This column displays the ‘Working MS DRG WT’ value in the orange font for the encounters for which ‘Possible MS DRG’ is blank or null.
Encounter Details P MS-DRG Type

Displays the Possible MS DRG type displayed on the Review page.
Encounter Details P MS-DRG AMLOS Displays the possible 'AMLOS' associated with the MS-DRG on the Revew screen.
Encounter Details P MS-DRG GMLOS Displays the possible 'GMLOS' associated with the MS-DRG on the Revew screen.
Encounter Details R MS-DRG

Displays both code and description of the Reconciliation Assessment MS-DRG along with the description displayed on the Reconciliation page.

Example: 872 - SEPTICEMIA OR SEVERE SEPSIS WITHOUT MV >96 HOURS WITHOUT MAJOR COMPLICATION OR COMORBIDITY (MCC).
Encounter Details R MS-DRG WT

Displays the WT associated with the Reconciliation Assessment MS-DRG displayed on the Reconciliation page.

Example: 1.0393.
Encounter Details R MS-DRG Type

Displays the Working MS DRG type displayed on the Reconciliation page.
Encounter Details R MS-DRG AMLOS

Displays the 'AMLOS' associated with the MS-DRG Reconciliation Assessment.

Example: 3.1.
Encounter Details R MS-DRG GMLOS

Displays the 'GMLOS' associated with the MS-DRG Reconciliation Assessment.

Example: 2.4.
Encounter Details W_DRG_AMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay (AMLOS) from Working Review panel.

Example: 3.4569

Note:
Advanced AMLOS is used if Primary AMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details W_DRG_GMLOS_Derived

Displays the total Geometric Mean Length of Stay (GMLOS) from Working Review panel.

Example: 2.7789

Note:
Advanced GMLOS is used if Primary GMLOS is blank.
Encounter Details W_DRG_MDC_Derived

Displays the list of Major Diagnostic Category (MDC) from Working Review panel.

Example: 01, 09, 15, 25 etc.

Note:
Advanced MDC is used if Primary MDC is blank.
Encounter Details W_DRG_ROM_Derived

Displays the total Rate of Mortality (ROM) from Working Review panel.

Example: 146

Note:
Advanced ROM is used if Primary ROM is blank.
Encounter Details W_DRG_SOI_Derived

Displays the total Severity of Illness (SOI) from Working Review panel.

Example: 154

Note:
Advanced SOi is used if Primary SOI is blank.
Encounter Details Weekend Only Stay

This is a flag to identify and indicate if the patient is admitted or discharged over weekend.

Example: Y, N

Note:
Displays Y if patient is admitted/discharged over weekend.

Weekend Only Stay = Y ( Unassigned encounters admitted after Friday, 6PM and Discharged before

Sunday, 11.59 PM) Weekend Only Stay = N (If the above criteria does not apply)
Encounter Details Working DRG

Displays the list of Working DRG codes and descriptions

Example: 977 - HIV W OR W/O OTHER RELATED CONDITION
Encounter Details Working DRG WT

Displays the weight value of Working DRG codes

Example: 120.44
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_AMLOS

Displays the total AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) from the Working DRG Review panel.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_AMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the total AMLOS (Arithmetic Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Working DRG Review panel.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_CODE

Displays the DRG Code from the Working Review panel.

Example: 777
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_CODE_ACTUAL

Displays the actual Working DRG code from the application DB.

Example: 777

Note:
Displays blank if field from application db is blank.
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_CODE_ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 147
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_DESCRIPTION

Displays the DRG Code description from the Working Review panel.

Example: Fever & inflammatory conditions
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_DESCRIPTION_ACTUAL

Displays the actual Working DRG description from the application DB.

Example: Degenerative nervous system disorders except multiple sclerosis

Note:
Displays blank if field from application db is blank.
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_DESCRIPTION_ADVANCED

Displays the DRG Code description using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: FEVER AND INFLAMMATORY CONDITIONS
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_GMLOS

Displays the total GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) from the Working Review panel.

Example: 5.00
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_GMLOS_ADVANCED

Displays the total GMLOS (Geometric Mean Length of Stay) using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 8.00
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_MDC

Displays the MDC value from the Working Review panel.

Example: 18
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_MDC_ADVANCED

Displays the MDC value using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 25
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_REMB

Displays the total Reimbursement value (in $) from the Working Review panel.

Example: 26.42
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_REMB_ADVANCED

Displays the total Reimbursement value (in $) using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 141.2
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_ROM

Displays list of Risk of Mortality (ROM) from the Working Review panel.

Example: 2
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_ROM_ADVANCED

Displays list of Risk of Mortality (ROM) using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 3
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_SOI

Displays list of Severity of Illness (SOI) from the Working Review panel.

Example: 1
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_SOI_ADVANCED

Displays list of Severity of Illness (SOI) using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 4
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_WT

Displays the total relative weight value from the Working Review panel.

Example: 1.1478
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_WT_ACTUAL

Displays the actual total Working DRG relative weight value from application DB.

Example: 1.1478

Note:
Displays blank if field from application db is blank.
Encounter Details WORKING_DRG_WT_ADVANCED

Displays the total relative weight value using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: 4.587
Encounter Details WORKING_MEDICAL_SURGICAL

Displays list of DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) from the Working Review panel.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details WORKING_MEDICAL_SURGICAL_ADVANCED

Displays list of DRG Type (Medical/Surgical) using Advanced grouper from the Working Review panel.

Example: M, S

Encounter Details X-Encounter Clarification Rate Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details X-Encounters With Clarifications Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details X-Encounters With Quality Impact Clarifications Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Details X-Quality Impact Clarification Rate Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Encounter Tracking Codes Tracking Code Displays the Tracking Code ID assigned to the encounter as configured in the Tracking Codes configuration screen.
Encounter Tracking Codes Tracking Code Description Displays the Tracking Code description assigned to the encounter as configured in the Tracking Codes configuration screen.
Encounter Tracking Codes Tracking Code ID

Displays the Tracking Code ID and Description assigned to the encounter as configured in the Tracking Codes configuration screen.

Example: Tracking Code ID - Tracking Code Description
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with Positive ROM Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with upward movement of ROM Value.

% of Reconciled cases with Positive ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 40%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Upward change in the ROM value for the reconciled encounter is considered a positive ROM Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) ROM After and ROM Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 1 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded ROM as 1.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 1 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 1./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 10%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 1 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 1

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 1 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 1.(or Working ROM as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 15%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded ROM as 2.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 2./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 45%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 2.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 2.(or Working ROM as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 25%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded ROM as 3.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 3./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 68%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 3.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 3.(or Working ROM as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 12%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded ROM as 4.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 4./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 88%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 4.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 4.(or Working ROM as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 33%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM % of Reconciled cases with ROM Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with upward/downward movement of ROM Value.

% of Reconciled cases with ROM Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM Before is not equal to ROM After./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Any change in the ROM value (Upward/Downward) for the reconciled encounter is considered a ROM Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) SOI After and SOI Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterROM % Shift of Reconciled cases with ROM 2

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with ROM Impact for ROM=2.

(Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 After- Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before)*100

Example: 36%
EncounterROM % Shift of Reconciled cases with ROM 3

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with ROM Impact for ROM=3.

(Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 After- Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 Before)*100

Example: 25%
EncounterROM % Shift of Reconciled cases with ROM 4

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with ROM Impact for ROM=4.

(Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 After- Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 Before)*100

Example: 58%
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with Positive ROM Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM After is greater than ROM Before.

Example: 31

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Upward change in the ROM value for the reconciled encounter is considered a positive ROM Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) ROM After and ROM Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 1 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 1.

Example: 4

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 1 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 1.(or Working ROM as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 5

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 2.

Example: 12

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 2 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 2.(or Working ROM as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 8

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 3.

Example: 6

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 3 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 3.(or Working ROM as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 3

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded ROM as 4.

Example: 17

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM 4 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment ROM as 4.(or Working ROM as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 23

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterROM Count of Reconciled cases with ROM Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the ROM Before is not equal to ROM After.

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Any change in the ROM value (Upward/Downward) for the reconciled encounter is considered a ROM Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) ROM After and ROM Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterROM Reconciled cases with ROM After Displays the count of reconciled encounters with ROM After CDI values.
EncounterROM Reconciled cases with ROM Before Displays the count of reconciled encounters with ROM Before CDI values.
EncounterROM ROM After CDI Enc Cnt

Displays the count of encounters with ROM After CDI values.

Example: 45
EncounterROM ROM Before CDI Enc Cnt

Displays the count of encounters with ROM Before CDI values.

Example: 45
EncounterROM ROM_After_CDI_Enc_Cnt Do not use.
EncounterROM ROM_Before_CDI_Enc_Cnt Do not use.
EncounterROM ROM_Value

Displays the Rate of Mortality (ROM) values.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with Positive SOI Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with upward movement of SOI Value.

% of Reconciled cases with Positive SOI Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 40%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Upward change in the SOI value for the reconciled encounter is considered a positive SOI Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) SOI After and SOI Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded SOI as 1

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 1./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 47%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 1

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 1.(or Working SOI as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 15%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded SOI as 2.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 2./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 18%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 2.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 2.(or Working SOI as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 81%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded SOI as 3.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 3./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 17%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 3.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 3.(or Working SOI as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 67%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 After

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Final Coded SOI as 4.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 After= The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 4./Total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 10%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 Before

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 4.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 Before = The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 4.(or Working SOI as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)/ The total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Example: 26%

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI % of Reconciled cases with SOI Impact

Displays the percentage of Reconciled cases with upward/downward movement of SOI Value.

% of Reconciled cases with SOI Impact= The total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI Before is not equal to SOI After./ Total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact)

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Any change in the SOI value (Upward/Downward) for the reconciled encounter is considered a SOI Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) SOI After and SOI Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterSOI % Shift of Reconciled cases with SOI 1

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with SOI Impact for SOI=1

(Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 After- Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 Before)*100

Example: 4%
EncounterSOI % Shift of Reconciled cases with SOI 2

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with SOI Impact for SOI=2.

(Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 After- Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 Before)*100

Example: 15%
EncounterSOI % Shift of Reconciled cases with SOI 3

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with SOI Impact for SOI=3.

(Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 After- Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 Before)*100

Example: 67%
EncounterSOI % Shift of Reconciled cases with SOI 4

Displays the shift in the reconciled cases with SOI Impact for SOI=4.

(Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 After- Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 Before/Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 Before)*100

Example: 27%
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with Positive SOI Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI After is greater than SOI Before.

Example: 19

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Upward change in the SOI value for the reconciled encounter is considered a positive SOI Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) SOI After and SOI Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 1.

Example: 14

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 1 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 1.(or Working SOI as 1 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 51

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 2.

Example: 24

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 2 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 2.(or Working SOI as 2 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 19

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 3.

Example: 39

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 3 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 3.(or Working SOI as 3 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 7

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 After

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Final Coded SOI as 4.

Example: 9

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI 4 Before

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters (Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) with Reconciliation Assessment SOI as 4.(or Working SOI as 4 when Discharge Date < 11/14/19 or Reconciliation Assessment DRG is blank)

Example: 1

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.
EncounterSOI Count of Reconciled cases with SOI Impact

Displays the total count of Reconciled encounters(Auto Reconciled, Reconciled-Impact and Reconciled-No Impact) for which the SOI Before is not equal to SOI After.

Note:
Advanced SOI/ROM Values are used if Primary SOI/ROM values are blank.

Any change in the SOI value (Upward/Downward) for the reconciled encounter is considered a SOI Impact.

Encounters with Blank (or NULL) SOI After and SOI Before is not considered for this metric calculation.
EncounterSOI Reconciled cases with SOI After

This is a Binary flag to identify and indicate if an encounter as SOI After CDI value.

Example: Displays 1 for encounters with ROM After CDI value.
EncounterSOI Reconciled cases with SOI Before

This is a Binary flag to identify and indicate if an encounter as SOI Before CDI value.

Example: Displays 1 for encounters with ROM Before CDI value.
EncounterSOI SOI After CDI Enc Cnt

Displays the count of encounters with SOI After CDI Values.

Example: 21
EncounterSOI SOI Before CDI Enc Cnt

Displays the count of encounters with SOI Before CDI Values.

Example: 19
EncounterSOI SOI_After_CDI_Enc_Cnt Do not use.
EncounterSOI SOI_Before_CDI_Enc_Cnt Do not use.
EncounterSOI SOI_Value

Displays the Severity of Illness (SOI) values.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4.
Facility Facility

Displays the Facility Name along with the ID as configured in the Facility Configuration Screen.

Example: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Facility Facility Description

Displays the Facility Description as configured in the Facility Configuration Screen.

Example: Facility Description

Facility Facility Id

Displays the Facility ID as configured in the Facility Configuration Screen.

Example: Facility ID
FactCode Accept Or Reject Displays the total count of codes Accepted and Rejected.
FactCode Accept Rate

Displays out of total suggested codes, the total count of codes accepted.

Example: 0.14
FactCode Accept Rate Perc

Displays out of total suggested codes, the percentage of codes accepted.

Example: 14.29%
FactCode Accepted

This is Binary Flag indicating if code is accepted.

Displays 1 when code status is accepted.
FactCode CLU_SEQ_NUM Displays the sequence number of the CLU Code.
FactCode Code

Displays the Diagnosis codes.

Example: A1419, A021 etc.
FactCode Code Count Displays the count of distinct codes.
FactCode Code Description

Displays the description of the code.

Example: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications, Hematemesis etc
FactCode Code Status

Displays the current status of the codes.

Example: Accepted, Hidden, Rejected, No Action.
FactCode Distinct Accept Displays the count of Distinct codes Accepted.
FactCode Distinct Accept Rate

Displays out of total suggested codes, the percentage of distinct codes accepted.

Example: 18%
FactCode Distinct Hidden Displays the count of Distinct codes Hidden.
FactCode Distinct Hidden Rate

Displays out of total suggested codes, the percentage of distinct codes hidden.

Example: 26%
FactCode Distinct Reject Displays the count of Distinct codes Rejected.
FactCode Distinct Reject Rate

Displays out of total suggested codes, the percentage of distinct codes Rejected.

Example: 2%
FactCode Distinct Suggest Rate

Displays out of total suggested codes, the percentage of distinct codes Suggested.

Example: 39%
FactCode Distinct Suggested Displays the count of Distinct codes Suggested.
FactCode Distinct Total Suggested Displays the count of Distinct codes Total Suggested.
FactCode Hidden

This is Binary Flag indicating if code is hidden.

Displays 1 when code status is hidden.
FactCode Reject Rate

Displays out of total suggested codes, the total count of codes rejected.

Example: 0.58
FactCode Rejected

This is Binary Flag indicating if code is rejected.

Displays 1 when code status is rejected.
FactCode SEQ_NUM Displays the sequence number of the code.
FactCode Suggested

This is Binary Flag indicating if code is Suggested.

Displays 1 when code status is Suggested.
FactCode SUGGESTED_IND This is a Binary Flag for codes that have been suggested to use by CLU.
FactCode Suggestion Type

Displays the list of Suggestion Type values.

Example: CC, MCC, HAC, CORE_MEASURE
FactCode Total Suggested

This is Flag indicating Total codes Suggested.

Displays 1 for every code.
FactNote BODY

Displays the text of the Note as mentioned in the 'Message' section in the Notes Screen.

Note:
Click on Send button after adding details in the "Message" section for the text to display below the Owner name in Notes Screen.
FactNote DESCRIPTION

Displays the type of the note sent by the user.

Example: CDE to Coding, CDE to CDE etc.
FactNote ENC_CONVERSATION_SID Do not use.
FactNote NOTE_CREATED_DATE

Displays the date when Note was created.

Example: 2/16/2020
FactNote NOTE_CREATED_DATE_LOCAL

Displays the date when Note was created.

Example: 2/16/2021
FactNote NOTE_CREATOR_NAME

Displays the name of the user that created the Note.

Example: Last Name, First Name Initial
FactNote NOTE_EXTERNAL_ID Displays the External ID created while adding a new note on the Notes Screen.
FactNote NOTE_SENT_DATE

Displays the date when Note is sent.

Example: 9/24/2020
FactNote NOTE_SENT_DATE_LOCAL

Displays the date when Note is sent.

Example: 9/24/2020
FactNote NOTE_STATUS

Displays the status of the Note created on the Notes screen.

Example: Sent, Received, Draft, Deleted.

Note:
Status column is displayed in the Left panel of the Notes screen.
FactNote NOTE_TYPE_REF_ID

Displays the Reference ID based on the Note type created.

Example: For CDE to Coding Note type, NOTE_TYPE_REF_ID is CDI_CODING
FactNote NOTE_UPDATE_DATE

Displays the date when Note is updated.

Example: 1/13/2020
FactNote NOTE_UPDATE_DATE_LOCAL

Displays the date when Note is updated.

Example: 1/13/2021
FactNote ORIGIN_SYSTEM_REF_ID

Displays the ID of the Origin System.

Example: "NG_CDI", "CLIN_CODING"
FactNote SEQ_NUM This displays the sequence number of notes.
FactNote SUBJECT

Displays the Subject of the note created on the Notes screen.

Note:
Subject column is displayed in the left panel of the Notes screen.

Subject of the Note is displayed on top in the right panel of the Notes screen
FactNote SUFFIX

Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.

Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.
FactNote USER_ID

Displays the User ID of the logged in user.

Note:
User ID as configured in the Users configuration screen is displayed.
FactVisit VISIT_ID Displays the Visit ID as configured in the Visit Type configuration screen.
Final Coded CM PCS Code Type

Displays the type of the ICD-10 Code.

Example: CM, PCS

Final Coded CM PCS Final Code Description Displays the Code description of the CM/PCS code added in the Final Coded Summary section.
Final Coded CM PCS Final Codes

Displays the list of CM/PCS Codes added in the Final Coded Summary section.

Example:

Pleurisy,

Extraction of Products of Conception, High, Open Approach

Final Coded CM PCS Final Coding POA

Displays the Present on Admission value for the codes added in the Final Coded Summary section.

Example: Y, N, 1 etc.
Final Coded CM PCS Flag

Displays the list of flags associated with the CM/PCS codes added in the Final Coded Summary section.

Example:

M is displayed if CM code added is a Major Complications or Comorbidities,

H is displayed if CM code added is a Hospital Acquired Condition.

OR is displayed if PCS code added is a Operating Room Procedure.

Final Coded CM PCS Review Type

Displays the type of review performed by the CDS from the application.

Example: ASSESSMENT, FINAL, POST_DISCHARGE_FINAL
Final Coded CM PCS SEQ_NUM Displays the sequence number of CM/PCS codes added in the Final Coded Summary section.
FinancialClass Financial Class

Displays the Financial Class along with Financial Class ID as configured in the Financial Class configuration screen.

Example:

Medicare (MED) in the format Financial Class Description (Financial Class ID)
FinancialClass Financial Class Desc

Displays the Financial Class description as configured in the Financial Class Configuration screen.

Example: Medicare
FinancialClass Financial Class Id

Displays the Financial Class ID as configured in the Financial Class Configuration screen.

Example: MED
Hidden Codes Hidden Codes List Displays the list codes that are hidden.
LastExecution Last Execution

Displays the time of the last ADF Execution .

Example: 2/16/2021
LastExecution Last Execution Display

Displays the date and time of the last ADF Execution .

03/16/2021 08:29:45 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
LastExecution SUFFIX

Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.

Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.
LicenseInformation DESCRIPTION

Displays the description of the Licenses available.

Example: CDE Insights, CDE Level 4 - View
LicenseInformation License Name

Displays the name of the Licenses available.

Example: CDE Insights, CDE Level 4 - View
LicenseInformation Licenses Used

Displays out of total licenses available, the total count of licenses being used.

Example: 5874
LicenseInformation Total Licenses

Displays the total count of licenses available.

Example: 12544
MeasuresDimension Index

Displays the sequence number of the measures in the order they are available.

Example: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5

1 is displayed for 'Unassigned Encounters' measure.

MeasuresDimension Measure

Displays the list of Measures available in the "Measure" drop down in the Encounter Monitoring dashboard.

Example: Unassigned Encounters, Non-Reconciled Encounters, Concurrent Encounters, Reconciled Encounters, All Encounters.
MeasuresDimension Measure Category

Displays the measure category for all these Measures.

Example: Encounter
MeasuresDimension Measure Selection

Displays the Measure selection from the measures raised by the CDS

Displays the Measure for the Measure selection (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the measure.

Example: Financial Measure, Quality Measure, Both Measure
MeasuresDimension Selected Measure

Displays the measure selected from the "Measure" drop down in the Encounter Monitoring dashboard to display and load data.

Example: Unassigned Encounters, Reconciled Encounters, etc.
MeasuresDimension Tooltip

Displays additional information for the the Measure category selected from the "Measure" drop down in the Encounter Monitoring dashboard.

Example: "The report displays the data for the encounters that have the status of Reconciled-Impact, Reconciled No Impact, Auto-Reconciled." data is displayed for "Reconciled Encounters" measure selected.
Patient Demographics Account Number

Displays the Account number of the patient.

Example: 123456789
Patient Demographics Admission Date and Time

Displays the admission date of the patient.

Example: 2/22/2020
Patient Demographics Admission Date and Time Display

Displays the admission date and time of the patient.

Example: 03/19/2020 12:00:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Patient Demographics Admission DateTime Sort

Displays the admission date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
Patient Demographics Admit Service

Displays the Admit Service assigned to the encounter.

Example: Cardiology
Patient Demographics Age at Admission

Displays the age of the patient during admission.

Example: 31
Patient Demographics Birth Weight

Displays the birth weight of the patient.

Example: 15.54
Patient Demographics Coder

Displays the name of the coder working on the encounter.

Example: Last Name, First Name

Patient Demographics CSN

Displays the list of City ID's as configured in the CSies configuration screen.

Example: CARD, ORTHO etc.
Patient Demographics Discharge Date and Time

Displays the discharge date of the patient.

Example: 2/22/2020
Patient Demographics Discharge Date and Time Display

Displays the discharge date and time of the patient.

Example: 03/19/2020 12:00:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Patient Demographics Discharge DateTime Sort

Displays the discharge date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
Patient Demographics DOB

Displays the Date of Birth of the patient.

Example: 1/13/1990
Patient Demographics Encounter CDS

Displays the name of the CDS assigned to the encounter.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Patient Demographics Encounter Status

Displays the list of the encounter status avaialble.

Example: Discharged, In Progress, Reconiled - Impact
Patient Demographics First Name

Displays the First name of the patient.

Example: Marsha
Patient Demographics Gender

Displays the gender of the patient.

Example: M, F etc.
Patient Demographics Initial Review Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time when Initial Review was performed by the CDS for the patient.

Example: 03/05/2021 06:40:11 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered and displayed.
Patient Demographics Last Name

Displays the First name of the patient.

Example: Downey
Patient Demographics Last Review Date and Time On Change Display

Displays the date and time of the last time the user saved when a change was made to the encounter.

Example: 01/07/2020 02:22:44 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Patient Demographics LOS

Displays the total Length of Stay (LOS) of the patient.

Example: 45
Patient Demographics MRN

Displays the Medical Record Number (MRN) of the patient.

Example: 12345
Patient Demographics Patient Name

Displays the name of the Patient.

Example: Last Name, First Name Middle Name
Patient Demographics Patient Type

Displays the patient type (mode of admission).

Example: Inpatient, Outpatient

Patient Demographics Pediatric

This is flag that identify and indicate if the encounter is Pediatric.

Example: Displays Y for pediatric encounters.
Patient Demographics Reconciliation Review Date and Time Display

Displays date and time when first Reconciliation review was performed by the CDS for the patient.

Example:
Patient Demographics Room

Displays the list of available patient's room numer.

Example: 101, 102, etc
Patient Demographics Weekend Only Stay

This is a flag to identify and indicate if the patient is admitted or discharged over weekend.

Example: Y, N

Note:
Displays Y if patient is admitted/discharged over weekend.

Weekend Only Stay = Y ( Unassigned encounters admitted after Friday, 6PM and Discharged before

Sunday, 11.59 PM) Weekend Only Stay = N (If the above criteria does not apply)
Post-Discharge Prioritization Category CATEGORY_TYPE

Displays the list of Post Discharge Category Types.

Example: SUGGESTED, USER_RECOMMENDATION
Post-Discharge Prioritization Category Opportunity Type

Displays the list of Opportunities identified for potential post review impact.

Example: No Reimbursable Secondary Dx, Unresolved Clarification etc.
Post-Discharge Prioritization Category Prioritization Category

Displays the list of all opportunities identified and recommended for potential post discharge review.

Example: No Reimbursable Secondary Dx, Resolved Clarification, Unresolved Clarification etc.
Post-Discharge Prioritization Category Status Do not use.
Post-Discharge Reviewer First Name

Displays the First Name of the Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: Marsha
Post-Discharge Reviewer Last Name

Displays the Last Name of the Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: Downey
Post-Discharge Reviewer Middle Name

Displays the Middle Name of the Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: Alexandara
Post-Discharge Reviewer Reiewer Name

Displays the name of the Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: Last Name, First Name MI
Post-Discharge Reviewer Reviewer

Displays the name along with the User ID of the Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Example: Last Name, First Name MI (User ID)
Post-Discharge Reviewer Reviewer ID

Displays the User ID of the Post-Discharge Reviewer.

Note:
User ID as configured in the Users configuration screen for a User with Post-Discharge Reviewer role is displayed.
Post-Discharge Reviewer Status

Displays the status of the Post-Discharge Reviewer user.

Example: Active, Inactive

Displays Active if the Post-Discharge Reviewer is an active user.
Program Baselines Baseline Average GMLOS The Average GMLOS applicable for CDE for each facility provided by the customer.
Program Baselines Baseline CMI The Baseline CMI applicable for CDE for each payer category provided by the customer.
Program Baselines Baseline Overall Clarification Count The total clarifications count applicable for CDE for each payer category provided by the customer.
Program Baselines Baseline Overall Financial Impact Clarification Count The total Financial Impact Clarifications count applicable for CDE for each payer category provided by the customer.
Program Baselines Baseline Total Discharges The total discharges applicable for CDE for each payer category provided by the customer.
Program Baselines Baseline Total Reviews The total reviews applicable for CDE for each payer category provided by the customer.
Program Baselines Baseline CMI Average Displays the aggregated CMI Value applicable for CDE for each payer category as provided by the customer. Select the specific payer and facility to look at the exact configured CMI value.
Program Baselines Baseline Medical CMI Average Displays the CMI average of Medical DRGs for each payer category that can be used as a baseline value to measure the Medical MS DRG program improvement or progress. This value should reflect Medical MS DRGs only.
Program Baselines Baseline Surgical CMI Average Displays the CMI average of Surgical DRGs for each payer category that can be used as a baseline value to measure the Surgical MS DRG program improvement or progress. This value should reflect Surgical MS DRGs only.
Program Baselines Target CMI Displays the CMI average for each payer category that can be used as a target/goal value to measure your MS DRG program improvement or progress. This value should reflect MS DRGs only.
Program Baselines Target Impact Clarification Rate Displays the Impact Clarification Percentage for each payer category that can be used as a target value to measure your Impact Clarification rate improvement or progress.
Provider Contact Email

Displays the Contact Email of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: abc.def@mnop.com
Provider Dragon Login ID

Displays the Dragon Login ID of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: DL
Provider Facility

Displays the name of the facilities as selected in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: ABC, DEF etc.

Note:
Multiple facilities are displayed comma separated.
Provider First Name

Displays the First Name of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: FirstName
Provider Last Name

Displays the Last Name of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: LastName
Provider NPI

Displays the National Provider Identifier (NPI) as selected in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: 123456, 123456789 etc
Provider Other Departments

Displays the list of Other Departments as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: Cardiology, Nephrology etc.

Note:
Multiple 'Other Departments' are displayed comma separated.
Provider Other Specialties

Displays the list of Other Specialties as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: Cardiologist, Neurologist etc.

Note:
Multiple 'Other Specialties' are displayed comma separated.
Provider Primary Department

Displays the Primary Department of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: Cardiology

Note:
Only one Primary Department can be configured.
Provider Primary Specialty

Displays the Primary Specialty of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: Cardiologist

Note:
Only one Primary Specialty can be configured.
Provider Provider ID

Displays the Provider ID of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: HLA , ProviderID, 0010234 etc.
Provider Provider Name

Displays the Name of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
Provider Provider User ID

Displays the User ID of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: abcdef, mnopqrst etc.
Provider Status

Displays the status of the Provider as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: Active, Inactive
Provider UPIN

Displays the Unique physician identification number (UPIN) as configured in the Provider Basics configuration screen.

Example: ABC123, 789MNO etc.
PSI Alerts Admit Month

Displays the monthly details of the quality alert information for inpatient admissions.

Example: 2020-05(May)
PSI Alerts Admit Quarter

Displays the quarterly details of the quality alert information for inpatient admissions.

Example: 2020-05(Mar) - 2020-05(May)
PSI Alerts Admit Week

Displays the weekly details of the quality alert information for inpatient admissions.

Example: 2020-04-26 - 2020-05-02

Note:
Sunday is considered as default start day of the week.
PSI Alerts Alert Category

Displays the Quality Alert category triggered for encounter.

Example: PSI, PDI, NQI
PSI Alerts Alert Resolution Rate

Displays out of total alerts generated, the percentage of count of alerts resolved.

Example: 89%
PSI Alerts Alert Status

Displays the current status of the Quality Alert triggered.

Example: Active, Resolved.
PSI Alerts Clarification Response Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time of the Quality Alert clarification responded.

Example: 07/10/2020 03:34:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered.
PSI Alerts Clarification Response DateTime Sort

Displays the clarification response date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
PSI Alerts Clarification Sent Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time of the Quality Alert clarification sent.

Example: 09/17/2020 08:26:24 AM ET

Note:
Facility Time zone is considered.
PSI Alerts Clarification Sent DateTime Sort

Displays the clarification sent date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
PSI Alerts CODE

Displays the Quality Alert code triggered.

Example: A41.50 , 5A1945Z
PSI Alerts CONCATE_QUALITY_ALERT_RESOLUTION_

RATE_KPI

This field is used for calculation for Resolution Rate KPI

Out of total quality clarifications (Type at Recon as PSI, PDI, NQI)generated, the count of quality clarifications resolved.

Example: 10 (92%)

Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.
PSI Alerts Discharge Month

Displays the monthly details of the quality alert information for inpatient discharges.

Example: 2020-05(May)
PSI Alerts Discharge Quarter

Displays the quarterly details of the quality alert information for inpatient discharges.

Example: 2020-05(Mar) - 2020-05(May)
PSI Alerts Discharge Week

Displays the weekly details of the quality alert information for inpatient discharges.

Example: 2020-04-26 - 2020-05-02

Note:
Sunday is considered as default start day of the week.
PSI Alerts Encounter CDS

Displays the name of the CDS assigned to the encounter.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
PSI Alerts Encounter Provider

Displays the name of the provider assigned to the encounter.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
PSI Alerts Encounter Status

Displays the list of encounter status available.

Example: Auto Reconciled, Discharged, In Progress
PSI Alerts Facility

Displays the list of encounter status available.

Example: ABC, DEF, MNOP etc
PSI Alerts Final Indicator

Displays a flag for Quality Alert clarifications with Final response.

Example: True
PSI Alerts Global Exclusion

Displays the list of Global Exclusions available to resolve the Quality Alert information.

Example: Present on Admission, No Exclusion- PSI Present etc.
PSI Alerts NOT_RESOLVED

Displays the total count of quality alerts not resolved.

Example: 18
PSI Alerts NQI Topic

Displays the list of NQI Topics available as configured in the Quality - NQI, PDI, PSI configuration screen.

Example: NQI_03 Neonatal Blood Stream Infection
PSI Alerts Other Reconciliation Type

Displays the list of both standard and custom 'Other Reconciliation Type' selected in the Clarifications screen for quality alert clarifications.

Example: Generic, MCC, Custom1

Note:
Multiple "Other Reconciliation Type' values are displayed comma separated.
PSI Alerts Payer

Displays the description along with the ID for the payer associated with the encounter.

Example: Payer Description (Payer ID)
PSI Alerts PDI Topic

Displays the list of PDI Topics available as configured in the Quality - NQI, PDI, PSI configuration screen.

Example: PDI_10 Pediatric Postop Sepsis, PDI_18 Pediatric Urinary Tract Infection Admission etc.
PSI Alerts Primary Reconciliation Type

Displays the Primary Reconciliation Type selected in the clarifications screen for quality alert clarifications.

Example: CC, MCC, Generic, Custom1, Custom2 etc.

Note:
Both standard and custom "Primary Reconciliation Type' is considered.
PSI Alerts PSI Agreed

Displays out of total quality clarifications (Type at Recon as PSI, PDI, NQI)responded, the count of quality clarifications agreed by the providers.

Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation

Example: 19
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Agreed Rate

Displays out of total quality clarifications responded, the percentage of quality clarifications agreed by the providers.

PSI Clarification Agreed Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Agreed/Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded)*100

Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Code

Displays the CM/PCS code for which quality alert is triggered.

Example: L89123, 02HA4RS etc.
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Provider

Displays the name of the provider with Final response to the quality alert clarification resolved.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Response

Displays the Final response of the quality alert clarification resolved.

Example: Agreed, Unable to Determine etc.
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Response Rate

Displays out of total quality clarifications sent, the percentage of quality clarifications responded by the providers.

PSI Clarification Response Rate = ( Quality Alerts Clarifications Responded/Quality Alerts Clarifications Sent)*100

Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Sent

Displays out of the total quality alerts generated, the count of quality clarifications sent by the CDS.

Example: 5

Note:
CDS can send the clarifications to resolve the alerts in 2 ways:

A. Selecting the "Create new clarification on Code" option from the Add to drop down option in the "Specific Exclusions" pop up.

B. Selecting the "New Clarification" link directly from the Quality Alerts panel

Only one clarification can be sent for each quality alert

This will not include the count of alerts that are active.

Clarifications for quality alerts with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation
PSI Alerts PSI Clarification Type

Displays the 'Primary Type' from the clarifications screen for quality alert clarifications raised by the CDS.

Example: PSI, PDI, NQI

Note:
This value is auto populated based on the quality alert clarification raised.

NQI is selected and disabled for NQI Quality Alert clarification raised.
PSI Alerts PSI Indicator Description

Displays the description of the quality alert topics.

Example: Pediatric Postop Sepsis, Pressure Ulcer etc.
PSI Alerts PSI Indicator ID

Displays the ID of the Quality alert topic.

Example: NQI_3, PSI_13, PDI_10 etc.
PSI Alerts PSI NoResponse

Displays out of total quality alert clarifications responded, the total count of quality alerts clarifications with Final Response as No Response.

Example: 5
PSI Alerts PSI NotAgreed

Displays out of total quality alert clarifications responded, the total count of quality alerts clarifications with Final Response as Not Agreed.

Example: 9
PSI Alerts PSI Responded

Displays out of of total quality clarifications sent, the count of quality clarifications responded by the providers.

Example: 13

Note:
Quality Alert Clarifications with a Final response are only counted.

Alerts for "Review Not Needed" encounter status are not considered for this metric calculation.

PSI Alerts PSI Topic

Displays the list of PSI Topics configured for the organization.

Example: PSI_17 Birth Trauma-Injury to Neonate, PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax etc.
PSI Alerts RESOLUTION_DETAIL

Displays the resolution for resolving the quality alert triggered.

Example: Exclusion code A02.9 present., Present on Admission etc.
PSI Alerts RESOLUTION_REASON

Displays the resolution category for resolving the quality alert triggered.

Example: GLOBAL_EXCLUSION, EXCLUSION_CODE, CLARIFICATION
PSI Alerts Resolved with Clarification

Displays the count of quality alerts resolved by creating clarifications.

Example: 5

Note:

1. CDS can send the clarifications to resolve the alerts in 2 ways:

a. Selecting the "Create new clarification on Code" option from the Add to drop down option in the "Specific Exclusions" pop up.

b. Selecting the "New Clarification" link directly from the Quality Alerts panel

2. Only one clarification can be sent for each quality alert

3. This will not include the count of alerts that are active.
PSI Alerts Resolved with No Exclusion

Displays the count of quality alerts for which CDS selects "No Exclusion - NQI Present"/ "No Exclusion - PDI Present"/ "No Exclusion - PSI Present" option from the Global Exclusion pop up based on the alert category to resolve the alert.

Example: 15
PSI Alerts Resolved with Other Global Exclusion

Displays the count of quality alerts for which CDS selects Global Exclusion’ (other than POA and No Exclusion(Present) ) criteria to resolve the alert.

Example: 15
PSI Alerts Resolved with POA

Displays the count of quality alerts resolved for which CDS selects "Present on Admission" option to

Example: 11

Note:

POA option can be used to resolve the alert can be used in 2 ways:

a. Adding the POA directly in the Review grid.

b. Selecting "Present on Admission" option from the Global Exclusion pop up.
PSI Alerts Resolved with Specific Exclusion

Displays the count of resolved quality alerts with ‘Specific Exclusion’ criteria set by the CDS.

Example: 24
PSI Alerts RESOLVED_IND

Displays the RESOLVED ind from the resolveds raised by the CDS

Displays the RESOLVED for the RESOLVED ind (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the resolved.

Example: Financial RESOLVED, Quality RESOLVED, Both RESOLVED
PSI Alerts Response Provider

Displays the name of the provider with Final response to the quality alert clarification resolved.

Example: Prefix Lastname, Firstname Middle Initial, Suffix, Title
PSI Alerts RESPONSE_DATE_LOCAL

Displays the local date of the Final response to the quality alert clarification resolved.

Example: 2/2/2021
PSI Alerts SENT_DATE_LOCAL

Displays the local date of the quality alert clarification sent by the CDS.

Example: 8/28/2020
PSI Alerts Specific Exclusion

Displays the specific exclusion added to resolve the quality alert triggered.

Example: Exclusion code K90.2 present, Exclusion code T31.31 present. etc.
PSI Alerts SUFFIX

Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.

Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.
PSI Alerts Topic

Displays the Quality Alert topic triggered.

Example: PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax, PSI_13 Postop Sepsis, NQI_03 Neonatal Blood Stream Infection etc
PSI Alerts TOPIC_ID

Displays the Topic ID associated with the Quality Alert topic.

Example: TOPIC_ID = 6 for 'PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax' Topic, TOPIC_ID = 10 for 'PDI_10 Pediatric Postop Sepsis' Topic etc.
PSI Alerts UnPivot Attribute

Displays alphabetically the list of Group-By options available for Quality Alerts dashboard.

Example: Admit Month, Encounter CDS, NQI Topic etc.
PSI Alerts UnPivot Quality Alerts Summary Dynamic Title

Displays the chart table name for which chart title gets updated dynamically based on the Group-By option selected.

Example: Quality Alerts Summary.

Note:
If "NQI Topic' is selected in Group-By option, chart title is updated dynamically to 'Quality Alerts Summary by NQI Topic'.
PSI Alerts UnPivot Value

Displays the values for the different Group-By (Attributes)

Example: PSI_06 Iatrogenic Pneumothorax, NQI, 2019-03(Mar) etc
Rejected Codes Rejected Codes List

Displays the list of diagnoses codes rejected by the CDS from CDS Assistant.

Note:
If CDS accepts multiple codes they are displayed comma separated.
Removed Codes #Removed Procedures Displays the count of procedure codes that are manually removed (rejected or hidden) by the CDS.
Note:
These codes are available under the Removed section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
Removed Codes #Removed Procedures_PCS Displays the count of PCS procedure codes that are manually removed (rejected or hidden) by the CDS.
Note:
These are the codes available under the Removed section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
Removed Codes #Removed Procedures_SNOMED Displays the count of SNOMED procedure codes that are manually removed (rejected or hidden) by the CDS.
Note:
These are the codes available under the Removed section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
Removed Codes Diagnoses Removed_Suggested (Including Quality) Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes removed by the CDS from the CDS Assistant.
Note:

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes .

Quality codes are included in this field.

Multiple values are comma separated.
Removed Codes Diagnoses Total Removed_Suggested (including Quality) Other Out of the total suggested codes, the total diagnosis codes that were removed, i.e. diagnosis codes that were manually removed by the CDS.
Note:

This column displays the count will include diagnosis codes from Suggested category (including Quality codes) and Other category.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Removed Codes Removed Procedures The Procedures codes that are manually rejected or hidden by the CDS.
Note:

These codes are available under the Removed section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple Procedure codes are displayed comma separated.
Removed Codes Removed Procedures_PCS The PCS Procedures codes that are manually rejected or hidden by the CDS.
Note:
  • These are the codes available under the Removed section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
  • Multiple Procedure codes are displayed comma separated.
Removed Codes Removed Procedures_SNOMED The SNOMED Procedures codes that are manually rejected or hidden by the CDS.
  • These are the codes available under the Removed section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
  • Multiple Procedure codes are displayed comma separated.
Review Metrics % Enc Reviewed

Displays the Enc reviewed from the % encs raised by the CDS

Displays the Enc for the % Enc reviewed (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the % enc.

Example: Financial Enc, Quality Enc, Both Enc
Review Metrics % of Total Encounters Reviewed

Displays the total count of encounters with Initial Reviews.

Example: 459

Note:
Use 'Initial Reviews' field instead.
Review Metrics Activity Date

Displays the Activity Date of the encounter.

Example: 7/5/2020
Review Metrics Activity Date and Time

Displays the Activity Date of the encounter.

Example: 7/5/2021
Review Metrics Activity Date and Time Display

Displays the Activity Date and Time of the encounter.

Example: 01/07/2020 02:15:10 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Review Metrics Activity Date2

Displays the Activity Date of the encounter.

Example: 7/5/2021
Review Metrics Activity DateTime Sort

Displays the activity date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
Review Metrics Activity Type

Displays the type of activity performed on the encounter.

Example: Clarification creation, Post-Discharge Review etc.
Review Metrics ACTIVITY_DATE_EST

Displays the Activity Date in EST Timezone.

Example: 7/5/2020
Review Metrics ACTIVITY_DATE_TIME_EST

Displays the Activity Date in EST Timezone.

Example: 7/7/2020
Review Metrics Additional Review CDS ID

Displays the CDS ID of the CDS that performed Additional Review on the encounter.

Example: Marsha
Review Metrics Additional Review CDS Name

Displays the name of the CDS that performed Additional Review on the encounter.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Review Metrics Additional Review Date and time

Displays the date and time of the Additional Review performed on the encounter.

Example: 4/27/2020
Review Metrics Additional Review Dates Do not use.
Review Metrics Additional Review Dates Dynamic

Displays list of Additional Review dates for the encounter.

Example: 5/27/2020

Review Metrics Additional Reviews

Displays the count of additional reviews performed for the reviewed encounters.

Example: 1, 3 , 2 etc.

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Additional Reviews done concurrently

Do not use.

Use 'Concurrent Additional Reviews' field under Review Metrics.
Review Metrics Additional Reviews done retrospectively

Do not use.

Use 'Retrospective Additional Reviews' field under Review Metrics.
Review Metrics Additional Reviews Per Day

Displays average daily additional reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range

Additional Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Additional Reviews with the additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)
Review Metrics Additional Reviews Weekdays

Displays the count of Additional Reviews performed during Weekdays.

Example: 18

Note:
Weekdays = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM)
Review Metrics Additional Reviews Per Day_Initial Reviews Additional Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Additional Reviews with the additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days worked_Initial Reviews )
Review Metrics ADDITIONAL_REVIEW_WEEKDAY

Displays the total count of Additional Reviews performed on an encounter including Weekdays.

Example: 25
Review Metrics ADMISSION_DATE_EST

Displays the Admission Date in EST Timezone.

Example: 7/5/2020
Review Metrics ADMISSION_DATE_TIME

Displays the Admission Date of the patient.

Example: 7/7/2020
Review Metrics ADMISSION_DATE_TIME_EST

Displays the admission date and time of the patient.

Example: 03/19/2020

Review Metrics ADMISSION_DATE_WEEKDAY

Displays the total count of admissions during weekdays.

Example: 45

Note:
Weekdays = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM)
Review Metrics ADMIT_MONTH

Displays the Admit Month as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)
Review Metrics ADMIT_QUARTER

Displays the Admit Quarter as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Admission Date is 9/25/2020, ADMIT_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Review Metrics ADMIT_WEEK

Displays the Admit Week as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Admission Date is 2/10/2020, ADMIT_WEEK is 2021-02-07 - 2021-02-13
Review Metrics All Additional Review Do not use. Use 'Additional Reviews' field .
Review Metrics Avg. Daily Additional Reviews

Displays the average daily 'Additional reviews' performed for the selected period.

Avg. Daily Additional Reviews= Total Additional Reviews/ No. of days.

Note:
No. of days include weekends.
Review Metrics Avg. Daily Additional Reviews Weekdays

Displays the average daily 'Additional reviews' performed during Weekdays for the selected period.

Avg. Daily Additional Reviews Weekdays= Total Additional Reviews during Weekdays (Additional Reviews Weekdays)/ No. of days.

Note:
No. of days = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e. Weekend Only Stay = N
Review Metrics Avg. Daily Initial Reviews

Displays the average count of Initial Reviews performed (Encounters Reviewed) for the selected period.

Avg. Daily Initial Reviews= Total Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews )/No. of Days.

Note:
No. of days include weekends.
Review Metrics Avg. Daily Initial Reviews Weekdays

Displays the average count of Initial Reviews performed during Weekdays (Encounters Reviewed) for the selected period.

Avg. Daily Initial Reviews Weekdays= Total Encounters Reviewed during weekdays (Initial Reviews Weekdays)/No. of Days

Note:
No. of days = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e., Weekend Only Stay = N
Review Metrics Avg. Daily Total Reviews Weekdays

Displays the average daily 'Total Reviews' (Total Reviews= Initial+Additional Reviews) performed during Weekdays for the selected period.

Avg. Daily Total Reviews Weekdays= 'Total Reviews during Weekdays ' (Total Reviews Weekdays)/ No. of days

Note:
No. of days = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e., Weekend Only Stay = N
Review Metrics Avg. Initial Review TAT (Days)

Displays the number of hours between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.

(Initial Review TAT (hours) for an encounter = Initial Review Date/Time- Admit Date/Time) hours

Avg. Initial Review TAT(Hours) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Hours) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hours)

Displays the number of days between encounter Admit Date/time and the date/time the Working Review was first created.

(Initial Review TAT (days) for an encounter = Initial Review Date - Admit Date) days

Avg. Initial Review TAT(Days) = Sum of Initial Review TAT(Days) of all the reviewed encounters / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews)

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

If patient is discharged before 24 hours, the Initial Review TAT (Days) =0
Review Metrics

Avg. Ranked Initial Review TAT (Hours)

 Displays the average Ranked Initial Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e. the number of hours between the Admit Date/Time and when the working review was first created.

Avg. Ranked Initial Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review Initial TAT (Hours) of all the ranked reviewed encounters / Ranked Encounters Reviewed).
Review Metrics

Avg. Unranked Initial Review TAT (Hours)

 Displays the average Unranked Initial Review TAT in hours for the selected View By option, i,e the number of hours between the Admit Date/Time and when the Working Review was first created.

Avg. Unranked Initial Review TAT (Hours) = (Sum of Review Initial TAT (Hours) of all the unranked reviewed encounters / Unranked Encounters Reviewed).
Review Metrics Cal Additional Reviews

Displays the Additional reviews from the cals raised by the CDS

Displays the Additional for the Cal reviews (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the cal.

Example: Financial Additional, Quality Additional, Both Additional
Review Metrics CDS

Displays the name of the CDS reviewing the encounter.

Example: Last Name, First Name (CDS ID)
Review Metrics Concurrent Additional Reviews

Displays the count of additional reviews done concurrently.

Example: 15

Note:

Concurrent Additional Review: Additional Review done prior to or on discharge.

Discharge Date/time >Additional Review Date/time or

Additional Review Date/time = Discharge Date/time

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Concurrent Initial Reviews

Displays the count of initial reviews done concurrently.

Example: 5

Note:

Concurrent Initial Review: Initial Review done prior to or on discharge.

Discharge Date/time >Initial Review Date/time or

Initial Review Date/time = Discharge Date/time

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Review Metrics Concurrent Total Reviews

Displays the sum of Initial and Additional reviews performed concurrently.

Example: 20

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics DAILY_REVIEW_OBJECTIVE Displays the Daily Objectives for reviewed encounters.
Review Metrics DISCHARGE_DATE_EST

Displays the Discharge Date in EST Timezone.

Example: 7/5/2020
Review Metrics DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME

Displays the Discharge Date of the patient.

Example: 7/7/2020
Review Metrics DISCHARGE_DATE_TIME_EST

Displays the Discharge date and time of the patient.

Example: 03/19/2020

Review Metrics DISCHARGE_DATE_WEEKDAY

Displays the total count of discharges during weekdays.

Example: 45

Note:
