Weekdays = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM)
Review Metrics DISCHARGE_MONTH

Displays the Discharge Month as per the Admission Date .

Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_MONTH is 2020-09(Sep)
Review Metrics DISCHARGE_QUARTER

Displays the Discharge Quarter as per the Discharge Date .

Example: If Discharge Date is 9/25/2020, DISCHARGE_QUARTER is 2020-07(Jul) -2020-09(Sep)
Review Metrics DISCHARGE_WEEK

Displays the Discharge Week as per the Discharge Date .

Example: If Discharge Date is 2/10/2020, DISCHARGE_WEEK is 2021-02-07 - 2021-02-13
Review Metrics Enc with Initial Review This is a Binary flag indicating if there is an initial review done on the encounter.
Review Metrics Encounters Reconciled Per Day

Displays average daily encounters reconciled in the selected activity date range.

Encounters Reconciled Per Day = (Total count of Reconciled encounters (Reconciled - Impact, Reconciled No Impact, Auto Reconciled) (assigned to the CDS) for which at least one activity was done by the CDS in the selected activity date range / No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)
Review Metrics Encounters with Clarification Per Day

Displays average daily Encounters with Clarifications in the selected activity date range.

Encounters with Clarification Per Day = (Total number of encounters with at least one clarification with status other than REMOVED or RETRACTED sent in the selected activity date range / No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)

Note:
  • Clarification Instance Sent Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
  • Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics FACILITY

Displays the Facility Name and description of the encounter.

Example: Facility Description (Facility ID)
Review Metrics First Review CDS ID Do not use.
Review Metrics First Review CDS Name

Do not use.

Review Metrics First Review Date

Do not use.
Review Metrics Initial Review CDS ID

Displays the User ID of the CDS performing the Initial Reviews.

Example: earlm
Review Metrics Initial Review CDS Name

Displays the CDS name performing the Initial Reviews.

Example: Earl,Marsha (earlm)
Review Metrics Initial Review Date

Displays the Initial Review Date of the encounter.

Example: 2/10/2021
Review Metrics Initial Review Date and Time

Displays the Initial Review Date of the encounter.

Example: 2/10/2022
Review Metrics Initial Review Date and Time Display

Displays the date and time of the Initial Review of the encounter.

Example: 08/13/2020 12:00:00 AM ET

Note:
Facility Timezone is considered.
Review Metrics Initial Review DateTime Sort

Displays the Initial Review date sorted by date and time.

Example: 20200102 04:38:46, 20200102 04:39:09, 20200102 04:40:16 etc.
Review Metrics Initial Review TAT (Days)

Displays the Initial Review Turn Around Time (TAT) for the encounter in Days.

Initial Review TAT (days) = (Initial Review Date – Admission Date ) in days.

Example: 2

Note:
If less than 24 hours, count as (0) days.
Review Metrics Initial Review Timing

Displays the type of review performed based on the time when Initial Review was performed.

Example: Concurrent Review, Retrospective Review.

Note:

Concurrent Review is displayed if Initial Review is performed before patient's discharge.

Retrospective Review is displayed if Initial Review is performed after patient's discharge.
Review Metrics Initial Reviews

Displays the Initial reviews from the initials raised by the CDS

Displays the Initial for the Initial reviews (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the initial.

Example: Financial Initial, Quality Initial, Both Initial
Review Metrics Initial Reviews done concurrently

Do not use.

Use 'Concurrent Initial Reviews' field under Review Metrics
Review Metrics Initial Reviews done retrospectively

Do not use.

Use 'Retrospective Initial Reviews' field under Review Metrics.
Review Metrics Initial Reviews Per Day

Displays average daily initial reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range.

Initial Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial Reviews with the Initial Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range )
Review Metrics Initial Reviews Per Day_Initial Reviews Initial Reviews Per Day_Initial Reviews = (Total number of Initial Reviews with the Initial Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days worked_Initial Reviews ). Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Review Metrics Initial Reviews Weekdays

Displays the count of Initial Reviews performed during Weekdays.

Example: 18

Note:
Weekdays = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM)
Review Metrics INITIAL_REVIEW_DATE

Displays the Initial Review Date.

Example: 12/2/2020
Review Metrics INITIAL_REVIEW_DATE_EST

Displays the Initial Review Date in EST Timezone.

Example: 7/5/2020
Review Metrics INITIAL_REVIEW_DATE_TIME_EST

Displays the Initial Review date and time in EST Timezone.

Example: 03/19/2020

Review Metrics INITIAL_REVIEW_TAT_HOURS Do not use. Use 'Initial Review TAT (Hours)' instead.
Review Metrics INITIAL_REVIEW_TAT_HRS_OBJECTIVE Displays the Daily Objectives for Review TAT in hours.
Review Metrics INITIAL_REVIEW_WEEKDAY

Displays the total count of Initial Reviews performed on an encounter including Weekdays.

Example: 25
Review Metrics IS_ADDITIONAL_REVIEW

Displays the ADDITIONAL review from the is raised by the CDS

Displays the ADDITIONAL for the IS review (Both standard and custom) selected when CDS raises the is.

Example: Financial ADDITIONAL, Quality ADDITIONAL, Both ADDITIONAL
Review Metrics No. of Days Worked

Displays the total number of days CDS has worked for in the selected activity date range.

If a CDS has at least an action performed (Initial Review or Additional Review) on a given date, it is counted as a "day worked".

Note:
  • All days of the week (including weekends) are considered.
  • Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculation.
Review Metrics No. of days worked_Initial Reviews If a CDS has at least one initial review on a given date, it is counted as a "No. of days worked_Initial Reviews".
Note:
In the existing Measure "No. of days worked", both initial and additional reviews are considered.
Review Metrics PAYER

Displays the list of Payers.

Example: Payer Description (Payer ID)
Review Metrics RETROSPECTIVE

Displays boolean value if Retrospective review is performed or no.

Example: True, False

Note:

True is displayed if Retrospective review is performed on the encounter.

False is displayed if Retrospective review is not performed on the encounter.
Review Metrics Retrospective Additional Reviews

Displays the count of additional reviews done retrospectively.

Example: 45

Note:

Concurrent Additional Review: Additional Review done prior to or on discharge.

Discharge Date/time >Additional Review Date/time or Additional Review Date/time = Discharge Date/time

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Review Metrics Retrospective Initial Reviews

Displays the count of initial reviews done retrospectively.

Example: 19

Note:

Retrospective Initial Review: Initial Review done after discharge.

Initial Review Date/time > Discharge Date/time.

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.

Review Metrics Retrospective Total Reviews

Displays the sum of Initial and Additional reviews performed retrospectively.

Example: 64

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Review CDS ID

Displays the User ID of the CDS performing encounter review.

Example: earlm
Review Metrics Review Rate3

Displays out of total encounters (Admissions/Discharges), the percentage of encounters reviewed.

Review Rate= Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) / Total encounters (Admissions/Discharges) x 100. (Rounded to 0 decimal places.)

Example: 89%

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Review Timing

Displays the type of review performed based on the time when Initial Review was performed.

Example: Concurrent Review, Retrospective Review.

Note:

Concurrent Review is displayed if Initial Review is performed before patient's discharge.

Retrospective Review is displayed if Initial Review is performed after patient's discharge.
Review Metrics Review Type

Displays the type of review performed.

Example: Initial Review, Additional Review
Review Metrics RM Encounter Count Displays the distinct count of encounters that have been reviewed.
Review Metrics SOURCE

Displays the list of sources.

Example: NG_CDI, CLIN_CDI etc.
Review Metrics SUFFIX

Displays the suffix for the default timezone configured.

Example: ET is displayed if Eastern Time is the default timezone configured.
Review Metrics Total All Reviews Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Review Metrics Total Reviews

Displays the sum of Initial and Additional reviews performed for the reviewed encounters.

Example: 85

Note:
Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Total Reviews Per Day

Displays average daily total reviews performed by the CDS for the selected Activity Date range

Total Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial and Additional Reviews with the Initial Review Date and additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days CDS worked in the selected activity date range)

Note:
  • Additional Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
  • Initial Review Date/Time falls in the selected activity date range.
  • Initial and Additional Reviews for Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Total Reviews Weekdays

Displays the sum of Initial and Additional reviews performed for the reviewed encounters during Weekdays.

Example: 75

Note:

Weekdays = Monday (12AM) - Friday (5:59 PM), i.e. Weekend Only Stay = N

Encounters with "Review Not Needed" encounter status are excluded from this metric calculations.
Review Metrics Total Reviews Per Day_Initial Reviews Total Reviews Per Day = (Total number of Initial and Additional Reviews with the Initial Review Date and additional Review Date in the selected activity date range/ No. of days worked_Initial Reviews). Rounded to 0 decimal places.
Review Metrics UNIT

Displays the list of Units available .

Example: CARD, TELE, UNIT1 etc.
Specialty DESCRIPTION

Displays the description of the Specialty as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.

Example: Cardiology
Specialty Specialty

Displays the Specialty description and ID as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.

Example: Specialty Description (Specialty ID)
Specialty Specialty ID

Displays the Specialty ID as configured in the Specialties configuration screen.

Example: CARD
Suggested Codes #Suggested CC Out of the total CLU suggested codes, this column displays the count of Diagnosis codes that display CC code indicator.
Note:
These codes are available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant
Suggested Codes #Suggested Diagnoses_Excluding Quality Displays the count of CLU Suggested Diagnosis codes that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis code.
Note:

This count should not include any Quality Diagnosis codes.

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested Diagnoses_Including Quality Displays the count of CLU Suggested Diagnosis codes that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes.
Note:
These codes are available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested ELX Out of the total CLU suggested codes, this column displays the count of Diagnosis codes that display ELX code indicator.
Note:
These codes are available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested MCC Out of the total CLU suggested codes, this column displays the count of Diagnosis codes that display MCC code indicator.
Note:
These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested Other Displays non CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis and Quality Diagnosis codes.
Note:
These codes are available under the Other section in the Diagnosis.
Suggested Codes #Suggested Procedures Displays the count of procedure codes that are suggested by the engine.
Note:
These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested Procedures_PCS Displays the count of PCS procedure codes that are suggested by the engine.
Note:
These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested Procedures_SNOMED Displays the count of SNOMED procedure codes that are suggested by the engine.
Note:
These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes #Suggested Quality Alerts Displays the count of CLU Suggested Quality Diagnosis codes related to potential HAC, PSI, PDI, NQI or Core measure opportunity.
Note:

This count should not include any other CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis.

These are the codes available under the Quality section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.
Suggested Codes Suggested CC Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes that display CC code indicator.
Note:

These odes are available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple values are comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Diagnoses_Excluding Quality Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis code.
Note:

This field should not include any Quality Diagnosis codes.

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Diagnoses_Including Quality Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes that display CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis, Quality diagnosis codes.
Note:

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated."
Suggested Codes Suggested ELX Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes that display ELX codes.
Note:

These codes are available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple values are comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested MCC Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Diagnosis codes that display MCC code indicator.
Note:

These codes are available under the Suggested section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple values are comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Other Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the diagnosis codes that display non CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis and Quality Diagnosis codes.
Note:

These are the codes available under the Other section in the Diagnosis.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Procedures The Procedure codes that are suggested by the engine.
Note:

These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple Procedure codes are displayed comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Procedures_PCS The PCS Procedure codes that are suggested by the engine
Note:
  • These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
  • Multiple Procedure codes are displayed comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Procedures_SNOMED The SNOMED Procedure codes that are suggested by the engine.
Note:
  • These are the codes available under the Suggested section in the Procedures category in CDS Assistant.
  • Multiple Procedure codes are displayed comma separated.
Suggested Codes Suggested Quality Alerts Out of the total CLU suggested codes, the Quality Diagnosis codes related to potential HAC, PSI,PDI, NQI or Core measure opportunity.
Note:

This field should not include any other CC, MCC, Target Diagnosis.

These are the codes available under the Quality section in the Diagnosis category in CDS Assistant.

Multiple values are displayed comma separated.
Type at Reconciliation Type at Reconciliation (Primary or Other) Displays primary reconciliation type and other reconciliation type values.
Unit Unit

Displays the list of available units.

Example: CARD, ICU, IM etc.
User Address Line 1

Displays the Address of the user as configured in 'Address Line 1' under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: 1/84 Street 1
User Address Line 2

Displays the Address of the user as configured in 'Address Line 2' under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Golf Street, 42
User Address Line 3

Displays the Address of the user as configured in 'Address Line 3' under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: California- 123456
User City

Displays the City information of the user as configured under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Texas
User Contact Email

Displays the Contact Email information of the user as configured under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: abc.def@xyz.com
User Contact Email Verified

Displays if the Contact email has been verified.

Example: Yes , No

Note:
Yes is displayed in case of verified Contact Email.
User Country

Displays the Country information of the user as configured under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: USA
User Department

Displays the Department information of the user as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example:Cardiology
User Email Address

Displays the Email Address of the user as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: abc.def@xyz.com
User EMR ID

Displays the EMR Login ID of the user as configured under EMR Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: 123456
User Facilities

Displays the list of facilities along with Facility ID user has access to as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Facility A (FACA), Facility B (FACB), Facility C (FACC) etc.

Note:
Facilities are displayed comma separated for users with access to multiple facilities.
User First Name

Displays the First Name of the User.

Example: FIRST
User Last Name

Displays the Last Name of the User.

Example: LAST
User Location

Displays the location of the user as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: 123456
User Middle Name

Displays the Middle Name of the User as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Middle
User Phone

Displays the Phone information of the user as configured under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: +123 456 789
User Roles

Displays the list of roles assigned to the user as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: CDS_MANAGER, FACILITY_ADMIN

Note:
Multiple roles assigned to the user are displayed comma separated.
User State

Displays the State information of the user as configured under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Georgia
User Status

Displays the status of the User.

Example: Active, Inactive

User Title/Credentials

Displays the Title/Credentials of the User as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Dr.
User User ID

Displays the User ID as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: abcdef
User User Type

Displays the User Type as configured in the Users configuration screen.

Example: Regular User, Nuance User, Nuance Service Account.
User Zip

Displays the Zip Code information of the user as configured under Contact Information in the Users configuration screen.

Example: 123456
Working Possible CM PCS CDI_ENC_DIAG_CODE_SID Do not use. Will be removed in future releases.
Working Possible CM PCS Code

Displays the Working/Possible diagnosis/procedure codes added in the encounter.

Example: R52, L89123
Working Possible CM PCS Code Description

Displays the code description of the Working/Possible diagnosis/procedure codes added in the encounter.

Example: Salmonella sepsis, Hypo-osmolality and hyponatremia
Working Possible CM PCS Code Type

Displays the code type of the Working/Possible diagnosis/procedure codes added in the encounter.

Example: CM, PCS
Working Possible CM PCS CORE_MEASURE_STATUS

Do not use.
Working Possible CM PCS Indicator

Displays the code indicators assigned to Working/Possible diagnosis/procedure added in the encounter.

Example: CC, MCC, HAC etc.
Working Possible CM PCS POA

Displays the Present on Admission (POA) value added to the Working/Possible diagnosis/procedure in the encounter.

Example: Y, N, 1 etc
Working Possible CM PCS PSI_STATUS

Displays the status of the Quality Alert triggered for the Working/Possible diagnosis/procedure added in the encounter.

Example: Salmonella sepsis, Hypo-osmolality and hyponatremia
Working Possible CM PCS Review Type

Displays the review where the diagnosis/procedure reviews are added in the encounter.

Example: WORKING, POSSIBLE
Working Possible CM PCS SEQ_NUM

Displays the sequence number of diagnosis/procedure seqs added in the encounter in Working/Possible reviews.

Example: 1, 2, 3 etc.

Note:
SEQ_NUM is displayed if the CM/PCS code is added in the 2nd position in Working/Possible Reviews.
